ftbquests.chapter.ad_astra.quest1DE4F6B6: Main component for transporting oxygen into our base, and yourself.
ftbquests.chapter.ad_astra.quest1EBA784A: Solar panels are renewable energy generation methods, use it if you are running short on coal.
ftbquests.chapter.ad_astra.quest233ACF10: Do i need to explain this one?
ftbquests.chapter.ad_astra.quest280D7D88: Tier 1 rocket will be the first step of your space journey! it is pretty easy to craft.
If you want to see how it will be crafted in the workbench, go on the &eNasa workbench&r in your &einventory,&r press &e"U"&r and you will see the item uses!

ftbquests.chapter.ad_astra.quest31044607: A special workbench to craft rockets.
ftbquests.chapter.ad_astra.quest40AB924B: Tier 2 Rocket is far more advanced than the first one you crafted, with tier 2 you can go to other planets.
ftbquests.chapter.ad_astra.quest474897F4: Other planets have different gravities, craft this block to stabilize them.
ftbquests.chapter.ad_astra.quest4E025FD0: Ad Astra is a space exploration mod that includes other planets and pretty beautiful looking tech systems.
This questline will guide you through the most of the mod!
ftbquests.chapter.ad_astra.quest4F1BEE80: Without the suit, you won't survive in the space!
ftbquests.chapter.ad_astra.quest57FE46E7: Pumps water into your system, make sure the water source is under the block.
ftbquests.chapter.ad_astra.quest693FEB46: Compressor is a extremely useful block, it obviously compressses things into plates! Which will allow us to create crucial things.
ftbquests.chapter.ad_astra.quest6C1B9031: When you build a badass base in the space, the oxygen won't just spawn inside it.. Use a oxygen distributer to distribute oxygen in your base!
ftbquests.chapter.ad_astra.quest6DA335B8: Basic furnaces won't be enough, we need to craft something that goes even hotter!
ftbquests.chapter.ad_astra.quest72A36A4B: Launch pads are essential to launch a rocket.
ftbquests.chapter.ad_astra.quest75B15513: Coal generator is the early-way of generating power in Ad Astra.
ftbquests.chapter.ad_astra.quest7F0F6B47: Oils can be found around in oceans, use a bucket to get some.
ftbquests.chapter.ad_astra.quest7FF04707: Iron plates are used in early-game recipes.
ftbquests.chapter.ad_astra.questD8A4EBC7: Large gas tank can be used on multiple crafting recipes, it is needed for oxygen distributor which is a important block.

ftbquests.chapter.advanced_progression.q: &cArchmage Gundalf&r... the biological father of those two brats you just turned into loot. Unlike his kids, he’s actually wise, way stronger, and has a much cooler beard.
His life was already pretty miserable, but the only two things he actually gave a damn about were taken by YOU. Sure, they were annoying, but they were his damn kids you monster!
He’s mourning the only way an Archmage knows how: by being &creally, really angry&r and making it your problem.
He appears after the death of shadow wizards. &8(His beloved children)
{image:customtextures:textures/gundalf_image.png width:100 height:125 align:center}
&cKill&r Archmage Gunddalf
Dimlite ore can be found in a uniform pattern in the overworld, between Y:-44 and Y:-64
Something echoes within it.
A boss drop from the shadow wizards.
### &bSuper Sniffer&r
You may have always found Sniffers &bWEAK&r and &cUSELESS..&r well sniffers also know this..
[gap=0]
but they're too lazy to change.
We could change that fact by just giving them some little motivational shocks :)
&aThe Super Sniffer can be spawned by striking a normal Sniffer with lightning!
It is recommended to use the &eLightning Staff&r to strike near a Sniffer for this transformation.
{image:customtextures:textures/super_sniffer_image.png width:100 height:75 align:center}
Super Saiyan Sniffer!
Slay &cThe Super Sniffer&r
Defeat Super Sniffer
Used to duplicate antiprisms which is a late-game material, so let's keep it.
It can also create lot of accessories.
A great combination of all five
The Virtue... basically a biblically accurate angel. It’s clearly pissed off that you decided to chuck an &cunholy lance&r into the sky.
{image:customtextures:textures/virtue_image.png width:100 height:75 align:center}
&8[Click to read]
Defeat Virtue &b[W.I.P]
Craftable Ingot
&e 4 Empty Essenses&r Created by throwing Black Matter into stygian blood to get Void Alloy Ingots.
A wealthy king once held cruel trials in his massive chamber. His &bTrial Guardian&r was famously ruthless to those who entered.
But time claims everyone, even the strongest. The king is dead and the guardian is left all alone... perhaps you’ll play his game one last time.
Insert a &eSpire Key&r into the lock in the Trial Tower basement to begin the encounter.
{image:customtextures:textures/trial_guardian_image.png width:100 height:65 align:center}
{image:customtextures:textures/trialspire.png width:250 height:100 align:center}
Trial Guardian Locator
&8[Click to read]
Slay &cThe Trial Guardian&r
Can be found on nether roof, blended in bedrocks.
You need Enhanced Terramity Pickaxes to mine!
It can be only obtained after defeating the Trial Guardian and obtaining a perish staff.
Iridescent shards can be found deep anywhere in the overworld.
Harbors the power of light
Craftable Ingot
Used in duplicating black matter and making tons of new stuff.
Rubies can be found almost in anywhere in nether.
Harbors the power of fire
Last tier ore, crafted with couple of other materials.
Circe and Merlin are basically just two spoiled brats who think they own the &cNether&r.
Their egos are so far through the roof that they’ll legit just ignore you because they think you aren't even worth the effort.
&aThey can be summoned by using Occult Fabric on an offering pedestal inside the Cthonic Cathedral, found sitting right on the &bNether Bedrock&r &aceiling.
{image:customtextures:textures/cathedral.png width:250 height:100 align:center}
Chthonic Cathedral Locator
&8[Click to read]
Shadow Wizards

This questline will walk you through everything step by step!
&c&lWARNING!&r

Vanilla and Netherite pickaxes won't work on higher tier ores. Make sure to use Terramity's own pickaxes to mine them!

ftbquests.chapter.ae2.quest1824ABB8F7FA3: Create Engineering Processors by merging Diamond, Printed Engineering Circuits, and Redstone in the Inscriber. These processors are needed for powering your most advanced AE2 machines.
ftbquests.chapter.ae2.quest18F89BE5ADFFC: Use the Network Tool to monitor channel usage and power consumption. Perfect for troubleshooting.
ftbquests.chapter.ae2.quest1B1835BC63E5B: Now that you have crafted your ME Drive, ME Controller, ME Terminal or Crafting Terminal, and Energy Acceptor, it's time to put everything together to build a working AE2 storage system!
-Place the ME Drive and install some storage cells (start with 1k or 4k cells).
-Attach the Energy Acceptor and provide it with power from your energy source to power the network.
-Connect the ME Drive and Energy Acceptor with AE2 cables (Glass, Covered, or Smart).
-Place the ME Controller nearby to manage your network channels.
-Connect the ME Terminal or Crafting Terminal to the network for easy access to stored items.
-Insert storage cells into the ME Drive and start storing your items digitally.
Get Your Digital Storage Up and Running
AE2 Storage Setup: Your First ME Network
ftbquests.chapter.ae2.quest1BB8D4C2ABC37: The covered cable variant offers no gameplay benefits over its Fluix ME Glass Cable counterpart. It can however be used as an alternate aesthetic choice if you prefer the covered look.
Can be colored in the same manner as Fluix ME Glass Cable. Four Fluix ME Covered Cable can be crafted with redstone and glowstone to make Fluix ME Dense Covered Cable.
ftbquests.chapter.ae2.quest1D839C76FD495: Applied Energistics is a huge storage mod that will make you replace tom's simple storage for sure!
You can hold "G" to an item to see what it does. Just like create ponder mechanic :D
&8(If you want to contribute like dex, u can always dm me on discord!)
ftbquests.chapter.ae2.quest1DBBB7D3AC587: With the Engineering Press and Diamonds, create Printed Engineering Circuits in the Inscriber. These are crucial for Engineering Processors and high-level AE2 components.
ftbquests.chapter.ae2.quest1F60D6F90DBB1: Other power sources also work with ae2, for example you can use Mekanism windmill to power up your ae2 system which i recommend.
ftbquests.chapter.ae2.quest1FE482282D4E3: Create ME Drives and Terminals to start storing items digitally — the core of AE2 storage.
The Drive is the &bdevice&r you plug your &bstorage cells&r into in order to use them for &bnetwork storage&r. It has 10 slots which each accept a cell.
If for some reason you want to, you can push and pull the cells from its inventory with any item logistics like hoppers or ae2 busses.
It can be rotated with a Certus Quartz Wrench.
Your basic terminal, allowing you to view and access the contents of your &bnetwork's storage&r and request things from your &bautocrafting&r setup.
ftbquests.chapter.ae2.quest2144A344B1769: Create Energy Cells to store power for your network. Dense cells hold more power — perfect for bigger setups.
It works by putting it right next to an Energy Acceptor or connect it via energy cable!
Stores up to 200 kAE amount of energy per cell. Multiple can be placed around the Acceptor
ftbquests.chapter.ae2.quest2822F59A793F6: Use your Charger to turn ordinary Certus Quartz into Charged Certus Quartz — a key ingredient for many AE2 recipes.
ftbquests.chapter.ae2.quest2B9672616C93D: Use the Logic Press to craft Logic Processors, designed for basic computations in your ME system. These are the simplest processors you'll use.
ftbquests.chapter.ae2.quest30715AAE9C04F: Make Calculation Processors by combining Pure Certus Quartz Crystal, Printed Calculation Circuits, and Redstone in the Inscriber. Use these for high-level automation, storage cells, and crafting upgrades.
ftbquests.chapter.ae2.quest3162C46FCFC99: The quartz fiber is used to share power between networks, while keeping them separate. This allows you to power subnetworks without needing to put energy acceptors and power cables everywhere.
Can be used to keep cables from connecting, although using cables of different colors or using Cable Achor is cheaper
ftbquests.chapter.ae2.quest33C0FE15CA881: Craft an AE2 wrench to rotate devices, remove cables, and safely dismantle blocks without losing materials. A must-have as your network grows.
ftbquests.chapter.ae2.quest34993A77A7CBB: Craft the Crafting Terminal to craft items anywhere directly from your ME Network.

The Crafting Terminal is similar to a regular terminal, with all the same settings and sections, but with an added crafting grid that will be automatically refilled from &bnetwork storage&r. Be careful when shift-clicking the output!
You should upgrade your terminal into a crafting terminal &l&bASAP&r&r.
ftbquests.chapter.ae2.quest364250500493C: Craft Logic Processors by combining Gold Ingots, Printed Logic Circuits, and Redstone in the Inscriber. Logic Processors are the backbone of basic AE2 machines and automation features.
Simple Automation for Your ME System
ftbquests.chapter.ae2.quest3D27AAE3D52B1: The Inscriber is where AE2 magic happens — use it with the presses found from meteorites to craft processors and other important parts. Get started crafting the brains of your network.
Same as the Charger, not required to input power via a special AE2 way.
ftbquests.chapter.ae2.quest416F3D8D06837: Charger has multiple uses in the mod, but for now we will use it to make a meteorite compass.
Needs power, but we recently got into the mod.. so we use a &ewooden crank!
Place it on side of a charger and then crank it till it powers up.
&8Wooden cranks will break after some use.
ftbquests.chapter.ae2.quest41BD8ED441485: So, you've started expanding on your network, and you've probably got a handle on resource generation, great, but what next? Setting up auto-crafting is what's next! Auto-crafting is probably one of the most essential parts of the mod and for creating large quantities of items, or any recipe you need.
AE2 Auto-crafting can allow you to request items on demand, keep a certain specific amount of item
in stock, automatically craft items and export them
ftbquests.chapter.ae2.quest42E31E44908BD: With the Calculation Press, create Calculation Processors, essential for performing complex calculations and automation tasks in AE2.
ftbquests.chapter.ae2.quest43B937DE1F432: Use the Logic Press and Gold Ingots in the Inscriber to make Printed Logic Circuits. These are key for building Logic Processors and several important AE2 parts.
ftbquests.chapter.ae2.quest43E8D547EABE0: &6Quantum Bridges&r offer a solution to long range, interdimensional networks.
For example, creating a link between the Overworld and the Nether systems, you should link two Quantum Bridges.
They transfer only 32 channels in total, mostly functions as a wireless Dense Cable.
They are constructed of 8 ME Quantum Ring blocks, surrounding one ME Quantum Link Chamber.
ftbquests.chapter.ae2.quest444A508DA7B4B: This was the most basic way of explaining Aut-Crafting, it has an monstrous amount of complexity behind it.
There are a few tips I can give you so far:
2. I suggest using Acceleration cards on them, to make them work faster.
3. Many of the components in this quest line have an "Extended" variant, they improve on their original's functionality by storing more, moving more, more jobs and etc.
4. When using the pattern terminal to make patterns, there will be 3 buttons:
- The "X" button - simply clears the pattern
- The Ingot Button - enables / disables Substitutions (for recipes that use items like an Ore Hammer)
- The Bucket Button - will enable / disable using just a fluid instead of a bucket or other item like that
ftbquests.chapter.ae2.quest4BE2E14DC30BA: It is very important to read the guide, since this questline is only touching the basic ground of AE2 and its capabilities!
Feedback appreciated via the discord feedback channel! (tag @!dex)
ftbquests.chapter.ae2.quest4D8229386678C: The best way to use P2P, is to use them to create, technically, portable Controller Faces. It is important in creating large networks.
Just put them on each side of a controller and use them for machines.
ftbquests.chapter.ae2.quest4FF1275D6D5F2: Use the Silicon Press to create Silicon Presses needed in processor recipes. This press helps you build electronic parts essential for your machines.
ftbquests.chapter.ae2.quest525845E9EFAC5: Mine Certus Quartz Crystals and Dust from meteorites.
Be careful to protect budding quartz blocks for an endless resource supply.
&eTip: Use cardboard boxes from Mekanism to move easily
You also have to make some Certus Quartz Dust, either by mining again from budding blocks or putting normal Certus Quartz Crystals in an Inscriber.
Certus Quartz Dust can be used for making Pipes, Quartz Glass or smelted into silicon!
ftbquests.chapter.ae2.quest56FC37AEC8ED5: Mostly clear glass made with Certus Quartz Dust. Used to make many AE2 machines and items.
ftbquests.chapter.ae2.quest59DDEECB0D3FA: Use the Calculation Press and Pure Certus Quartz Crystal in the Inscriber to make Printed Calculation Circuits. These form the core of Calculation Processors and automation upgrades.
ftbquests.chapter.ae2.quest61041A9BF25A5: Craft the ME Controller — the brain of your ME Network! It manages all connections, controls channel limits, and keeps everything running smoothly. Place it carefully: your network devices connect through it to communicate and function.
- The size of the controller must be within 7x7x7; else it will turn red.
- A controller can have 2 adjacent blocks in at most 1 axis; if a block violates this rule, it will disable and turn red.
Now this one is a bit tough, so stay with me.
The controller is the routing hub of a &bME Network&r. Without it, a network is "ad-hoc" and can only have a max of 8 channel-using &bdevices&r total.
It is not possible to have 2 controllers in one ME Network.
The controller requires 6 AE/t per controller block to function. Each controller block can store 8000 AE, so larger networks might require additional energy storage.
Multiblock Controllers can be built in a fairly free form.
However, there are a few rules that must be followed:
- All controller blocks on a ME Network must be connected; else the blocks will turn red.
Manage and Expand Your AE2 Network
Heart of the Network: ME Controller
ftbquests.chapter.ae2.quest6252BC9282ACC: Your AE2 network needs power! Build the Energy Acceptor to connect your system to energy sources and keep everything running smoothly.
ftbquests.chapter.ae2.quest65EBEFBFF0138: So far, we have set-up a basic AE2 network, maybe not so basic, depends on how you play this mod.

You might realize, by expanding the network, everything is starting to take maybe a little too much channels on the cables? Do not worry! AE2 has a few solutions for this in the form of P2P and Quantum Bridges.

Point to Point tunnels, or P2P Tunnels, act as a way to move a lot of things throughout your network, without interacting with the network directly. That's kind of confusing, so imagine P2P Tunnels as a Portal, connecting two location through the use of Fluix Cabels.
(make sure to also check the AE2 guide for detailed explenation)
ftbquests.chapter.ae2.quest66EF071A5EDBB: Storage Components are the core of all AE2 cells, determining the capacity of the cells. Each tier increases the capacity by 4x and costs 3 of the previous tier.
Begin by creating the first 1k Storage Component, ideally creating a maxed out 1k Storage Cell ME Drive would currently the best thing.
Storage Cells are one of the primary methods of storage in Applied Energistics. They go in &bME Drives&r or &bME Chests&r.
Storage components can be removed from the housing if the cell is empty by shift-right clicking with the cell in your hand.
The upfront cost of types is such that a cell holding 1 type can hold 2x as much as a cell with all 63 types in use.
ftbquests.chapter.ae2.quest677C7E63E071D: Craft the Meteorite Compass to find meteorites around the world.
Meteorites are how you start the mod, they include essential items!
Dig inside the meteor and break the blocks you find in it.
ftbquests.chapter.ae2.quest69C0B0AF6B0A3: While ME networks are also created by adjacent ME-capable machines, cables are the primary way of extending an ME network over larger areas.

&eIf you are new to AE2 and unfamiliar with channels, use smart cable and dense smart cable wherever you can. It will show how channels are routed through your network, making their behavior more understandable.&r

&5Fluix ME Glass Cable&r is the simplest cable to make, transfers power and up to 8 &bchannels&r. It comes in 17 diffrent colors, the default being Fluix, and can be dyed any color using any of the 16 dyes.

To craft colored cables surround a dye of any type with 8 cables of the same type ( color of the cables dosn't matter, but they must be the same type, glass, smart, etc ). You can also paint cables with any forge compatible paint brush in world.
You can craft any colored cable with a water bucket to remove the dye.
You can cover the cable with wool to create Fluix ME Covered Cable, and craft Fluix ME Smart Cable to get a better idea of what is going on with your channels.
ftbquests.chapter.ae2.quest6ABC5228466A1: There are two main terminals used for Auto-crafting:

- uses Blank Patterns to create Patterns, most Commonly Crafting and Processing Patterns. Crafting Patterns will go into the providers that connect to your Molecular Assemblers, while Processing Patterns will go to the provider that connects to a machine or other inventory.
- gives you a way to access all providers on your network remotely. It is handy, but only for a lot of providers, not handy when your system is still small
ftbquests.chapter.ae2.quest6ABCA58C8E5B6: As you may have guessed, Providers and Assemblers do exactly the same as the name suggests.

When requested, a Pattern Provider will read a pattern inside itself, and push the ingredients written on the pattern into any adjacent inventories. These inventories can be almost anything, allowing for you to create a truly staggering variety of things with your Auto-crafting system.

The Molecular Assembler is the wrokhorse of the Auto-crafting system. Best way to use them is by putting them next to a single Pattern Provider, they are the machines that do the crafting for the system.
ftbquests.chapter.ae2.quest700DE6D96334E: Use the Silicon Press in the Inscriber to make Printed Silicon from Silicon. Printed Silicon is needed in every processor recipe and is a staple item for AE2 crafting.
ftbquests.chapter.ae2.quest73BE55CE529F4: Any auto-crafting system requires 3 Main Modules:
Craft Processing Units, The Providers/Assemblers, and the Terminals
Or CPUs, define how large your craft can be, and how many steps can be performed at once. They consist of two parts: Co-processors, and Crafting Storage
The Co-Processor is responsible for telling your network to send more ingredients more often. While technically it is not required, it would be unwise to not have an abundance of these...

The Crafting Storage allows your crafts to be bigger, and contain more steps. Crafting storage blocks use the same ingredients used in storage cells, and can be un-crafted back into their parts by hand
ftbquests.chapter.ae2.quest7403EE5D0E354: Through the use of a Memory Card, we can Connect our P2P Tunnels. P2P Tunnels wont work while not configured.
Shift + Right-Click on a P2P Tunnel to create a new frequiency, or copy the existing Frequency if there is one, then Right-Click the P2P end tunnel you want to use to set it's frequency.
&n&6The item will not be lost if used!&r&r
A P2P Tunnel system may have only one input, but as many outputs as the cable you use allow for.
ftbquests.chapter.ae2.quest79C499E5E6130: Make Fluix Dust and Crystals by combining Certus Quartz and Redstone, required by many recipes from now on
ftbquests.chapter.ae2.quest79EBEC31BC907: Start with the ME Chest for your first digital storage before advancing to ME Drives.

The ME Chest acts like a miniature network with a ME Terminal, ME Drive, and Energy Acceptor. While it can be used as a tiny storage network, its capacity for just one single storage cell means it has limited utility as such.
ftbquests.chapter.ae2.quest7F8CB607C5418: The Quantum Link Chamber has only one slot, for a &6Quantum Entagled Singularity&r.
One is needed for each Link Chamber, however you get 2 from a sigle explosion :)
ftbquests.chapter.ae2.quest7FBE856FF3F46: The Engineering Press crafts Engineering Processors, used for advanced circuit crafting and powering complex machine operations.
ftbquests.chapter.ae2.questD59AB28BAD4E3: While bearing some similarity to Fluix ME Covered Cable in appearance, they provide diagnostic function by visualizing the channel usage on the cables, the channels appear as lit colored lines that run along the black stripe on the cables giving you an understanding of how your channels are being used on your network. For regular smart cables, the first four channels show as lines matching the color of the cable, the next four show as white lines. For dense smart cable, each stripe represents 4 channels (will talk further on that later).
On networks with a &bME Controller&r (fruther down the quest line), the lines on the cables show the exact path the channels take.
These can also be colored in the same manner as Fluix ME Glass Cable.
ftbquests.chapter.ae2.questD9DBD9835CEA9: Higher Capacity cable, can carry 32 &bchannels&r unlike standard cable which can only carry 8, however it &4doesn't support buses&r so you must first step down from dense to a smaller cable (such as Fluix ME Glass Cable or Fluix ME Smart Cable) before using buses or panels. (explained a bit later)
Dense cables slightly override the "shortest path" behavior of channels, channels will take the shortest path to a dense cable, and then the shortest path through that dense cable to a controller.

Go ahead and make yourself 8 of them!
ftbquests.chapter.ars_nouveau.quest19D02: Archwood logs will generate extra source because they're... burnable and magical.

The Volcanic Sourcelink generates Source by consuming items that are burnable.
ftbquests.chapter.ars_nouveau.quest1D86B: The Dominion Wand is used for controlling the creatures you might encounter in the world! Each being responds differently to the wand, so make sure to read up in the Worn Notebook!
ftbquests.chapter.ars_nouveau.quest227DB: In Ars Nouveau, the power system for machines is called &9Source&r.
To start collecting some Source, we'll need a Source Jar.
ftbquests.chapter.ars_nouveau.quest2D0CF: Placing this near growing plants or saplings will provide Source. Archwood trees provide more Source!
ftbquests.chapter.ars_nouveau.quest3142A: The &6Dowsing Rod&r gives you Magic Find and Scrying when used.
This allows you to see nearby magic creatures as well as helping you find amethyst!

ftbquests.chapter.ars_nouveau.quest3D862: The Enchanting Apparatus is used to craft some items.
Use JEI if u wanna know the other items!
ftbquests.chapter.ars_nouveau.quest40BC6: The Imbuement Chamber requires Source to imbue items. It produces a small amount of Source by itself, but can also use Source Jars as a power source.
ftbquests.chapter.ars_nouveau.quest41A0B: The &9Alchemical Sourcelink&r produces Source from adjacent potion jars.
The amount of source varies per potion and complexity.
ftbquests.chapter.ars_nouveau.quest457DE: The &9Ritual Brazier&r is used to cast rituals. If you want to light the Brazier, use a Light spell on it.
To perform rituals, you'll need Arcane Pedestals as well. As there are so many rituals to cast, make sure to check out each of them using the Worn Notebook!
This can be done by holding Ctrl on the Ritual Table while the book is in your inventory.
ftbquests.chapter.ars_nouveau.quest4D9F6: The &9Potion Jar&r stores up to 100 potions. You can remove them by using an empty bottle or a potion flask on the jar.
Wixies will use these jars during Potion Autocrafting.
ftbquests.chapter.ars_nouveau.quest51162: With mana, your arrows are now magical arrows!
ftbquests.chapter.ars_nouveau.quest5766C: Source gems are a really important material which can be crafted by using The imbuement chamber!
I don't remember much but lapis works just fine!
ftbquests.chapter.ars_nouveau.quest5C3FF: Now we can get to making some systems!
ftbquests.chapter.ars_nouveau.quest5CFBA: Press ''C'' While Holding Your Spellbook. This will open the glyph page, basically creating your own magic.

&eWe all just care about spells right?

Hitting the &eC&r key will open up the spell creation page.
ftbquests.chapter.ars_nouveau.quest6B511: Bottom left of your screen, There's the mana bar.
There are several ways to increase your mana such as enchantments, artifacts, armors and upgrading your spellbook!

ftbquests.chapter.bleed_magic.quest15CEE: Play With Friends - Share Your LP!
Key of Binding lets you share your Life Essence with teammates!
Bind a Key of Binding to your Soul Network
Give the bound key to a friend
They hold it in their offhand or curio slot
Now their sigils and bound items draw from YOUR LP!
Perfect for servers where one player focuses on LP generation while others focus on combat. Power your entire team's sigils, bound weapons, and rituals from a single massive Soul Network!

ftbquests.chapter.blood.quest52C7C09BB82: BloodThe Blood school is themed around evil; you will find elements of necromancy, wither, and blood magic here, with spells focusing on damage that buffs the caster.
ftbquests.chapter.blood.quest54922EBD779: Target one of your magic summons to cause them to explode, killing them instantly, and dealing large damage in the area around them. The summon's remaining health boosts the damage dealt and radius of explosion.
ftbquests.chapter.blood.quest6BB9C0339C4: Hold to cast a ray of necrotic energy that siphons health from creatures it hits, damaging them and healing you for 100%% of damage done.
ftbquests.chapter.blood.quest6EE8B66A4F3: Instantaneously teleport to where you are looking, or directly behind any targeted creature. Gain a short duration of true invisibility upon reaching your destination.
ftbquests.chapter.blood.quest7C567B72428: Create a ring of needles made from blood and fire them forward, skewering targets and healing you for 25%% of damage done.
ftbquests.chapter.blood.questEFA169E521A: Cast to inflict yourself with Heartstop, an effect that makes you temporarily invulnerable. However, once it wears off, you take 50%% of all damage accumulated while under its effects.
ftbquests.chapter.blood.title: <grad from=#910308 to=#9C6466>Blood Element</grad>

ftbquests.chapter.bosses.quest10544AC337: &cFrostmaw&r is a legendary golem that protects the cold biomes.
Using eye of frost can help to find it's location.
<grad from=#FFFFFF to=#99D6EA><pulse base=0.65 a=0.8 f=1.5>The Frostmaw</pulse></grad>
ftbquests.chapter.bosses.quest11A438ECC0: &cThe Warden&r rests deep under the ground.
It resides a strange and worrying fauna that reacts to sounds. Don't make too much noise or you might wake it up.
<grad from=#0FA49B to=#0FA49B><pulse base=0.5 a=1.8 f=2.5><glitch f=0.3 j=0.003 b=0.001 s=0.02>The Warden</glitch></pulse></grad>
ftbquests.chapter.bosses.quest12404E9F50: &cThe Void Blossom&r is a corrupted overgrown plant.
Located deep undergrounds&r, use a &eVoid Lily&r to locate it
<neon p=7 r=3 a=0.14><grad from=#6A0D6A to=#B44DB4 f=0.5>Void Blossom</grad></neon>
ftbquests.chapter.bosses.quest124B15AB90: <shadow a=0.4><grad from=#EDD6FF to=#EDD6FF><pulse base=0.75 a=0.3 f=0.8>Void Entities</pulse></grad></shadow>
ftbquests.chapter.bosses.quest151982E611: &cTongbi&r is a martial artist that trains his students in his Monastery that can be located using a &eEye of the sculptor.
You can either fight him or finish his training.
I'm just here for the rewards
Kill <grad from=#FF0000 to=#FF0000><pulse base=0.4 a=2.0 f=5.0>Tongbi</pulse></grad> or &aDo his test
ftbquests.chapter.bosses.quest17A934CFAC: &cDame Fortuna&r is a gambler that still lives in her mom's house.
She can be called using a &dDevil's Ante&r.
ftbquests.chapter.bosses.quest1877819E0E: &cThe Swampjaw&r is a natural predator that threatens the entirety of the Swamp Biome.
It can be lured into an encounter by using a &dFossil Bait&r.
&eIf you want to locate bosses, use the Explorer's Compass!
ftbquests.chapter.bosses.quest199DC3A3AD: &cThe Netherite Monstrosity&r is a huge monster that used to help humans gather resources in nether, before shutting down for no reason.. since it's off, this is a free kill!
Use an Eye of Monstrous&r to locate his palace.
<grad from=#0D0D0D to=#FF6A00><fade a=0.85 f=1.2>The Nether Monstrosity</fade></grad>
ftbquests.chapter.bosses.quest19CC31C023: &cDune sentinel&r is a big living cannon that shoots bombs.
ftbquests.chapter.bosses.quest1B7A8A9D9F: &8The leader of the &6&lNether Cult&r&8, the king of the &0&lBottomless Pit...&4&l Apollyon.&r&8 It is your task to challenge him and hopefully overcome his wickedness and free this world of his influence.

&8To summon &4&lApollyon&r&8 you must prepare a ritual. A ritual that will hold all of the sacred artifacts of the &0&ldark arts&r&8. Therefore, if you are not fully prepared, you should not rashly start this trial.
&0&lThe Black book&r&8 is all you need in order to find information on how to gather these items.
&eAlternate ritual in the next page if you have already beaten Apollyon before ->
&8This ritual requires a &4&lDoom Medal&r&8 that only &4&lApollyon&r&8 drops.
&8This ritual is detailed in the book of the dark arts, &0&lThe Black Book&r&8, in the &6&lRevelation&r&8 section you will find how to summon this hellish god into your world.
&8If you can defeat his incarnation in this trial, then you can obtain the real power of &6&lAscension&r&8 and be promoted to a true &cApostle&r&8.
&eFor Rituals, please continue to the next page.
&8To summon an incarnation of &4&lApollyon&r&8 you need to perform a sabbath ritual just like the one you did for the &cApostles&r&8
&eThis ritual however, is a little harder:
<neon><wave a=0.2 f=0.2 w=0.5><grad from=#FF0000 to=#BF0000 f=0.5><glitch f=1 j=0.1 b=0.1 s=0.15>THE LORD OF APOCALYPSE
<neon><wave a=0.2 f=0.2 w=0.5><grad from=#FF0000 to=#BF0000 f=0.5><glitch f=1 j=0.1 b=0.1 s=0.15>APOLLYON
ftbquests.chapter.bosses.quest1C57631063: A powerful beast that they call the &cForsaken&r.
To perform such a ritual, they must be 4.
<neon p=10 r=3 a=0.18><shadow a=0.7><grad from=#FF0000 to=#0D0D0F f=2>The Forsaken</grad></shadow></neon>
ftbquests.chapter.bosses.quest1CFAEC25C1: &cMalkuth&r is definition of balance, ice and fire, ying yang.
He can adapt to any damage in seconds but can only do it with a delay.
Locate eye of Malkuth to locate him!
<grad from=#FFD700 to=#00FFFF f=2><swing a=0.4 f=1 w=0.3>Malkuth</swing></grad>
ftbquests.chapter.bosses.quest1DEA9C4237: &cThe Trial Guardian&r is the protector of the huge trial chamber in your world, take him down for the goodie goodies.
<grad from=#E8E8E8 to=#00FFFF><shake a=0.5 f=0.8><wave a=0.5 f=0.8 w=0.5>The Trial Guardian</wave></shake></grad>
ftbquests.chapter.bosses.quest212654DFE2: &cFerrous Wroughtnaut&r is a legendary warrior from the past. Go and wake him up for a challenge!
&cImportant:&r He can only take damage when attacked from the back.
Using the Eye of Wrought can help you locate his room.
ftbquests.chapter.bosses.quest218A1EC80D: &cThe Wither&r is a natural apex predator sealed away because of it's greediness.
Recommended to spawn the wither at least one thousand&r blocks away from your base.
<grad from=#000000 to=#FFFFFF f=2><glitch f=0.5 j=0.005 b=0.001 s=0.03><shake a=0.3 f=0.5>The Wither</shake></glitch></grad>
ftbquests.chapter.bosses.quest23A4E443A7: &cWithered Abomination&r is a experiment from pillagers that turned out to be a failure, left in the depths of nether.
<grad from=#404040 to=#0D0D0D f=1><turb a=0.5 f=0.8>The Withered Abomination</turb></grad>
ftbquests.chapter.bosses.quest27BF2E3F79: &cIgnis&r is waiting for a opponent, he trained for his all life. How about just show him that his life is pretty much worthless.
He can be located using the &dEye of Flame&r and confronted by placing &dBurning Ashes&r inside the &dAltar.&r
&l<neon p=6 r=1 a=0.08><grad from=00FFFF to=FF6600 f=0.6>Ignis</grad></neon>
ftbquests.chapter.bosses.quest28A1B5EFA6: &cRosalyne, Blade of Dusk&r is an awful princess who perished in the endless depths of a sea of thorny bushes.
She can be unsealed using a Dusk Key&r found in a chest whitin her sanctuary&r located in flower biomes&r.
<grad from=#D8A0FF to=#D8A0FF><bounce a=0.2 f=0.5 w=0.2>Rosalyne, Blade of Dusk</bounce></grad>
ftbquests.chapter.bosses.quest296D1FA302: &6Geburah&r is a judging mechanism made by some pyschopath. &eIt weighs the sins of you, acts by it.&r Considering how much bad things you've probably done.. good luck with
&aUsing ranged can give you advantage in this boss fight.
<neon p=8 r=2 a=0.12><shadow a=0.5><grad from=#FFD700 to=#FF6600 f=0.7><fade a=0.5 f=0.8>Geburah</fade></grad></shadow></neon>
ftbquests.chapter.bosses.quest2A35F4DAC7: &cThe Harbinger&r is a human-made robot that was supposed to rival the wither.
The Eye of Mech&r can help you find It's location.
<grad from=#FF6666 to=#FF0000 f=0.8><glitch f=0.8 j=0.01 b=0.002 s=0.05>The Harbinger</glitch></grad>
ftbquests.chapter.bosses.quest3186C6AC85: &8The closest followers of the first &cNether Cultist&r&8, <neon><wave a=0.2 f=0.2 w=0.5><grad from=#FF0000 to=#BF0000 f=0.5><glitch f=1 j=0.1 b=0.1 s=0.15> APOLLYON</glitch></grad></wave></neon>, these &cterrific beings&r&8 spread the word of the &6&lG&er&6e&ea&6t &eF&6l&ea&6m&ee&r&8 alongside their&4&l master&r&8 when they walked the &3Overworld&r&8.

&5After the ultimate art of &2necromancy&r&5 was reconstructed&r&8, you finally understood the nature of that &cfluctuation&r&8, and unexpectedly discovered a &ehidden secret path to &l&6As&e&lce&r&6&lns&r&e&lio&r&e&ln&r&8. It is the art of ascending to &6&lgodhood&r&8 from the &3lower realm&r&8, embracing &4&ldestruction&r&8 and thus seizing the great power of the &cHell Realm&r&8.

&8But after repeated experiments, you finally found a way to capture &6&ldivinity&r&8, although this method is not perfect. That &6&ldivinity&r&8 dissipated after the descrution of the &cApostles&r&8, but it is enough for you to achieve what you want in your mind.
&eAchieve a false godhood by obtaining the Broken Halo:
&eApostles also drop the Broken Halo with a &n10%%&r &echance.

&8Some &cApostles&r&8 used to be &6Kings&r&8, &5Lords&r&8 or &bNobles&r&8, while others range from normal &aVillagers&r&8 to the most ill-witted &2Nitwits&r&8. &cWhen the emissary appears&r&8, &l&9the water auround them boils&r&8, &8&land the sky darkens&r&8.
&8To bring an &cApostle&r&8 to your &3realm&r&8 you must perform a &5Sabbath&r&8 Ritual.
&8Using this structure you must sacrifice valuable items belonging to members of the &cApostle's&r&8 race.
&8- 8x Witch hat / Warlock Sash / Infernal tome.

<neon p=6 r=1 a=0.08><shadow a=0.6><grad from=#FF0000 to=#FFD700 f=1.6><bounce a=0.2 f=0.5 w=0.2><turb a=0.1 f=0.3><wiggle a=0.3 f=0.8 w=0.3>The Pale Faced Envoys of The Nether</wiggle></turb></bounce></grad></shadow></neon>

<neon p=6 r=1 a=0.08><shadow a=0.6><grad from=#FF0000 to=#FFD700 f=1.6><bounce a=0.5 f=0.8 w=0.5><pend f=0.8 a=20 r=1><turb a=0.5 f=0.8><wiggle a=0.3 f=0.8 w=0.3><shake a=0.3 f=0.5>The Apostle</shake></wiggle></turb></pend></bounce></grad></shadow></neon>
ftbquests.chapter.bosses.quest3A5FA9732B: &cThe Chesed&r is a really old artifact that is clearly a alien technology.
Myth says it still works after all those decades.
Use eye of chesed to locate
<grad from=#090E1F to=#56B83A f=0.5><glitch f=0.8 j=0.01 b=0.002 s=0.05>The Chesed</glitch></grad>
ftbquests.chapter.bosses.quest3A64A56DCB: &cThe Ancient Guardian&r is a heavy-hitting giant monster, that protects these annoying silverfishes.
<grad from=#42383C to=#7A6A70 f=0.5><shake a=0.3 f=0.5>The Ancient Guardian</shake></grad>

<neon p=6 r=1 a=0.08><grad from=#EFF1F0 to=#584E54>The Skeletosaurus</grad></neon>
ftbquests.chapter.bosses.quest3B65B70FC8: &cThe Scylla&r Rests above the sea and within the sky in a floating palace called Acropolis.
The Eye of Storm&r may lead you to this sacred place.
<neon p=8 r=2 a=0.15><shadow a=0.4><grad from=#FFFF99 to=#ADD8E6><pend f=0.6 a=10 r=0.5>Scylla</pend></grad></shadow></neon>
ftbquests.chapter.bosses.quest3DD7492E07: &cFrostbitten Golem&r is a big frozen golem that can be found in snowy and cold biomes.
He summons dangerous ice spikes to hurt its enemies.
ftbquests.chapter.bosses.quest3F7769C34F: &cObsidilith&r is a huge "tanky" golem that once was a pet of the ender dragon itself, some say he enjoyed that status but hey we don't talk about that.
Use &eEye of Ender&r to locate it
<grad from=#0D0D0D to=#CC00FF><pulse base=1.5 a=4 f=3.2 w=24><fade a=0.4 f=1.0 w=0.1>Obsidilith</fade></pulse></grad>
ftbquests.chapter.bosses.quest4158A5819F: &cThe Dead King&r is a long forgotten reign which remains within the Catacombs&r deep undergrounds.
Using a &6Wayward Compass&r can help you find its corpse.
It is resting endlessly, unless someone decides to wake him up...
ftbquests.chapter.bosses.quest415AE751E7: &cThe Luxtructosaurus&r was on top of the foodchain until, you arrive.
Throwing a Ominous Catalyst&r into an active Volcanic Core&r could lead to yet another disaster.
<grad from=#4A0000 to=#FF4500><wiggle a=0.5 f=1 w=0.5>The Luxtructosaurus</wiggle></grad>
ftbquests.chapter.bosses.quest418B954780: &cThe Ancient Remnant&r survived that one meteor, is that enough?
Can be found sleeping in the &eCursed Pyramid&r, It can be found using the &6Eye of Desert&r.
To wake it up get a &enecklace of the desert&r
<neon p=8 r=2 a=0.12><shadow a=0.5><grad from=#FFD700 to=#FF6600 f=0.7><fade a=0.5 f=0.8>Geburah</fade></grad></shadow></neon>
ftbquests.chapter.bosses.quest43BBC5B6DC: &9The Immortal&r is one of the oldest creatures. With many experience, he is a tough foe.
He used to fight alongside ender dragon but was sealed away by &bUnderworld Knight&r because of his actions of trying to become immortal.
Some say he did succeed in becoming immortal..
<shadow a=0.4><grad from=#00CED1 to=#FFFFFF f=1><wiggle a=0.5 f=1 w=0.5>The Immortal</wiggle></grad></shadow>
ftbquests.chapter.bosses.quest44A6B81B88: &cThe Night Lich&r is the tooth fairy of this world, he's pretty much a fraud though, take him down.
With soul stars you can locate it's presence.
<grad from=#017F91 to=#BDF3F4 f=0.9><pulse base=0.75 a=0.3 f=0.8><bounce a=0.3 f=0.6 w=0.3>The Night Lich</bounce></pulse></grad>
ftbquests.chapter.bosses.quest46A8E64D8B: &cThe Corpse Warlock&r represents the orchestra of death, manipulating life as it wish.
Towards the goal of forming a powerful army, he has taken place within the Nether&r and built a Bloody Altar&r for Its plan.
The &dEye of Bloody Altar&r is a coveted treasure to find this criminal.
<neon p=6 r=1 a=0.08><grad from=#000000 to=#CC0000 f=0.3><shake a=0.3 f=0.5>The Corpse Warlock</shake></grad></neon>
ftbquests.chapter.bosses.quest499BBB799E: &cThe &cLord Pumpking Head&r is a huge fraud that got him killed years ago, maybe bring him back with a ritual?
&8I can't really put links in the quests anymore so i suggest going in locator manually and look for infernal pumpkin.
<neon p=9 r=3 a=0.15><grad from=#FF7300 to=#FFD700>The Lord Pumpkinhead</grad></neon>
ftbquests.chapter.bosses.quest4D0C8DAA46: Used to summon the captain cornelia
ftbquests.chapter.bosses.quest4E79F98D4B: End / Throw the orb to the void.
&c<grad from=#404040 to=#8036CC f=0.5><pulse base=1.5 a=0.6 f=0.8>The Doppelgänger</pulse></grad>
ftbquests.chapter.bosses.quest501B9A970B: &cUmvuthi&r is a god-like creature with a cult. Go stop them because why not?
<grad from=#FFFFFF to=#FFD700><pend f=0.5 a=10 r=0.3><swing a=0.2 f=0.5 w=0.1><wave a=0.1 f=0.3 w=0.2>Umvuthi The Sunbird</wave></swing></pend></grad>
ftbquests.chapter.bosses.quest50EDD2850C: &aThe Obliterator&r has been built by an alien life-form. It has only one purpose and it is to destroy the &cnether.&r
Well, actually they're still working on it, so before it's actually done. Go destroy it!
ftbquests.chapter.bosses.quest54B2129015: &cThe Cumulonimbus&r is a powerful entity that resides in the Cloud Temple&r. It has the power to alter the weather as it pleases.
It can be located using an Eye of Air&r.
<grad from=#E8F4FF to=#FFFDE8 f=1.5><wave a=0.5 f=0.3 w=0.5><turb a=0.5 f=0.5>The Cumulonimbus</turb></wave></grad>
ftbquests.chapter.bosses.quest584355C70C: Use the guardian core to wake him up!
<grad from=#3A3A3A to=#FFFFFF f=1><fade a=0.5 f=0.8>Ongoing Ritual</fade></grad>
ftbquests.chapter.bosses.quest5C3E27D95D: Born blessed with magic itself. &cTyros&r was a prodigy, though he is still a human. He died from old age.
You can still call his soul with &6Cinderous Soulcaller&r and challange him.
Use Ancient Furled Map to locate citadel.&r
<neon p=6 r=1 a=0.08><shadow r=1 a=0.4><grad from=#1A1A1A to=#FFA040 f=1.3>Echo of Tyros, First Flamebearer</grad></shadow></neon>
ftbquests.chapter.bosses.quest5F3C7FCC54: This entity attacks anyone who dares to disrupt the &cRedstone Monstrosity's&r comfort.
It is located in the exact same place where the Redstone Monstrosity resides.
Use the Explorer's Compass to locate the Redstone Mines structure!
<grad from=#8B0000 to=#FF0000><pulse base=0.65 a=0.8 f=1.5>Redstone Golem</pulse></grad>
ftbquests.chapter.bosses.quest6A721B304A: Banished in the depth of the &eFrosted Prison&r, &bMaledictus&r was sealed within a &6Cursed Tombstone&r by the god itself.
Though, a punishment that seems to have bestowed incredible powers to a supposed damned individual.
Releasing him may be the final nail in the coffin. Find him using the &eEye of Curse. &r
ftbquests.chapter.bosses.quest6B722C26CE: &cBone Chimera&r was a feared monster back then, owned by a strong warrior. That warrior passed away from aging but bone chimera was loyal and kept waiting for it's owner to come back.
ftbquests.chapter.bosses.quest6BB9BD4C78: &bRealmwarden&r formerly known as the &3Nameless Guardian&r, once fought alongside the Ancient Steve to seal away &9the Immortals&r, earning great distinction on the battlefield.
ftbquests.chapter.bosses.quest7044D2F80D: &cThe Leviathan&r, will remind you of subnautica.
It can be found into the Sunken City&r using the Eye of Abyss&r Lure it with &6Abyssal Sacrifice&r that is inside of the &6Altar of Abyss.&r
<grad from=#0D0D0D to=#8B00FF f=0.6><wave a=0.5 f=0.8 w=0.5>The Leviathan</wave></grad>
ftbquests.chapter.bosses.quest70B8CE564F: &cOvergrown Colossus&r is a old protector of villagers.
ftbquests.chapter.bosses.quest73709211BC: It can be called using a &dHaunted Bell&r.
<grad from=#513E5C to=#FFD700><fade a=0.4 f=1.0 w=0.1>The Bellringer</fade></grad>
ftbquests.chapter.bosses.quest73E06DA3E0: &cLava Eater&r is a big lizard that is immune to fire. That's literally it.
<grad from=#6E1818 to=#FF6600><pend f=0.6 a=10 r=0.5><swing a=0.3 f=0.8 w=0.2>Lava Eater</swing></pend></grad>
ftbquests.chapter.bosses.quest7587CE5F52: &cThe Nightwarden&r once owned the literal ender dragon, now rests inside a citadel, trying to get rid of his sins.
Go to the End dimension, locate the Void Cathedral using an &eEye of Nothingness&r and look upstairs for a Excrucis. This should allow us to awake him.
<grad from=#BF7FFF to=#6A0DAD f=1><turb a=0.5 f=0.8>The Nightwarden</turb></grad>
ftbquests.chapter.bosses.quest79342DE0E0: &bRelic Annihilator&r is one of the &bAncient Steve's&r creations, once took part in the war against &9The Immortal&r. Relying on its pair of wheel-feet and rear thrusters, it gained astonishing mobility; its missiles and rotating saw blades could tear through any defense.
ftbquests.chapter.bosses.quest7958902B69: &cEnder Guardian&r tries to protect ruined citadel.
Can be found using the &6Eye of Void.&r
<grad from=#D8A0FF to=#D8A0FF><pulse base=0.75 a=0.3 f=0.8>The Ender Guardian</pulse></grad>
ftbquests.chapter.bosses.quest7A3560E7A0: This creation was developed by the same individuals who created &cThe Harbinger.&r This time, their intention was to use it against The Harbinger, but unfortunately, they lost control of this entity as well.
<grad from=#CC0000 to=#FF3333><pulse base=0.65 a=0.8 f=1.5><turb a=0.2 f=0.4><shake a=0.2 f=0.4>Redstone Monstrosity</shake></turb></pulse></grad>
ftbquests.chapter.bosses.quest7B090EAB0B: Allows you to dive underwater and explore it easily!
ftbquests.chapter.bosses.quest7BE325F21B: &cThe Nether Gauntlet&r used to bring justice in nether until.. the wither arrived
<shadow a=0.4><grad from=#FFFF00 to=#FF0000 f=0.8><fade a=0.5 f=0.8>The Nether Gauntlet</fade></grad></shadow>
ftbquests.chapter.bosses.quest7FA7E7C8E3: To remain the greatest, &l<neon p=6 r=1 a=0.08><grad from=00FFFF to=FF6600 f=0.6>Ignis</grad></neon>&r and the <grad from=#27EEF5 to=#000000 f=0.7><wave a=0.3 f=0.5 w=0.5>Underworld Knight</wave></grad> continued to fight for years on end. However, even &l<neon p=6 r=1 a=0.08><grad from=00FFFF to=FF6600 f=0.6>Ignis</grad></neon>&r was no match for him in the end. &8The size difference explains it..&r
The knight isn't even waiting for someone to challenge his strength anymore. He knows he's &cthe strongest&r.
&8is the knight even aware of the greater things out there?&r
<grad from=#27EEF5 to=#000000 f=0.7><wave a=0.3 f=0.5 w=0.5>Underworld Knight
ftbquests.chapter.bosses.quest84E78C259C: &cThe Posessed Paladin&r, a fallen man which corpse was captured by an evil soul.
It is found in the Abandoned Crypt&r and can be located using an Eye of Ghost&r.

<neon p=6 r=1 a=0.08><shadow a=0.4><grad from=#ADD8E6 to=#00008B><pulse base=0.65 a=0.8 f=1.5><pend f=0.5 a=10 r=0.5><turb a=0.3 f=0.5>The Possessed Paladin</turb></pend></pulse></grad></shadow></neon>
ftbquests.chapter.bosses.quest8F03B215CC: Use &6Shell Horn&r to call her out.
<neon p=8 r=2 a=0.15><grad from=#00FFFF to=#8B4513 f=1.3><wiggle a=0.5 f=1 w=0.5>Captain Cornelia</wiggle></grad></neon>
ftbquests.chapter.bosses.questD87F91C4EC: &cShadow Wizards&r experiments on people consistently, go bring democracy to the nether!

ftbquests.chapter.building.quest172804B7: Press &b"G"&r to open the configuration menu and change settings.
&6&nSurface Mode:&r Places a layer of blocks that matches the exact contours of the wall or floor you are looking at.
&6&nVertical \& Horizontal Wall Modes:&r Generates flat vertical or horizontal planes based on your configured radius (such as a 3x3 or 5x5 grid).
&6&nBuild to Me:&r Generates a straight line of blocks starting from your targeted block directly to your position.
&6&nGrid \& Column Modes:&r Creates spaced-out pillars or straight vertical and horizontal lines.
Primary tool for building. It draws blocks directly from your inventory.
ftbquests.chapter.building.quest18FF0716: Right-clicking a compact block with the shrinking device will transport you inside of it, providing an isolated pocket dimension where you can build freely.
ftbquests.chapter.building.quest2882F403: Main tool for redecorating or updating palettes. It swaps existing blocks in the world with blocks from your inventory.
ftbquests.chapter.building.quest3D2C8593: The primary tool for clearing out large areas quickly. It void-clears blocks instead of mining them, meaning the blocks will &cNOT&r drop as items. On the plus side, it completely ignores chests and other inventories to prevent accidental item loss, but you should still use it with caution.
ftbquests.chapter.building.quest428771C3: Make sure to use &eJEI&r in order to see the recipes.
Thousands of new blocks can only be crafted here.
ftbquests.chapter.building.quest49833EE4: &b- Copy-Paste:&r Allows you to define a region by selecting two opposite corners, copy the layout, and paste it elsewhere. The tool checks your inventory and will only place the blocks if you have the required materials.
&b- Cut-Paste:&r Functions like a clipboard move tool. It lifts an entire structure out of the world and pastes it into a new location, automatically clearing out the original spot.
Main tool that will allow you to move or duplicate entire builds.
ftbquests.chapter.building.quest49DA079E: <shadow><grad from=#4EF44E to=#BBFF99 f=0.5>Creeper</grad><grad from=#FFFFFF to=#C0C0C0> exploded and destroyed your </grad><grad from=#4EF44E to=#BBFF99 f=0.5>terrain</grad><grad from=#FFFFFF to=#C0C0C0>?</grad></shadow>

<shadow><grad from=#FFFFFF to=#C0C0C0>Just throw the </grad><grad from=#4EF44E to=#8B4513 f=0.5>hole filler</grad><grad from=#FFFFFF to=#C0C0C0> into a hole and it will start </grad><shake a=0.75 f=0.75><grad from=#FFFFFF to=#C0C0C0>expanding like crazy</grad></shake><grad from=#FFFFFF to=#C0C0C0>!</grad></shadow>
<shadow><grad from=#FFFFFF to=#C0C0C0>There's other variations check </grad><grad from=#FFA040 to=#FFD080 f=0.5>JEI</grad><grad from=#FFFFFF to=#C0C0C0> to see</grad></shadow>
ftbquests.chapter.building.quest51324B3C: This is a separate block used alongside the Copy-Paste Gadget. It allows you to save your copied builds onto paper templates, which can then be converted into text codes to share online or import into different worlds.
Save your copied builds onto paper template.
ftbquests.chapter.building.quest5D1C5022: Make building easier by using the Just Enough Items (JEI) search bar to quickly filter through decoration and structural blocks.

Might add something extra to bows,
&8Acting as if bows didn't get a lot of love already in this update&r
The enchant gives an effect/does a certain thing whenever a condition is met.
Surely you've conquered &5The End&r by now and you're entering late game.
This unlocks the best of the best enchants, more options, more utility for each piece.
Explore and see what you get.
&8good luck with those curses once more&r
Effects activate when meeting the condition of blocking attacks.
Infuses the arrow with a certain effect, similar to melee's &a"Infused"&r enchant, same ideology.
If only you could infuse swords with bows so they throw out daggers, right?
Now this is a new enchanting system with extra stuff for armors, tools, and weapons!
Just like vanilla tables, put bookshelves around it to increase the &elevel&r of the table, and use chiseled bookshelves to filter out enchants you don't want, it's that easy!
Enchants like these usually aim to &cbypass armor&r or &cpenetrate defenses&r, read as you will on the descriptions.
I mean, what do you think a meat shredder would do to meat?
This is what you use instead of lapis to enchant items.
This allows you to enchant &7basic&r to more advanced &bcelestial&r enchants, try your luck and watch out for &4curses&r as well, just like regular enchanting.
Death enchants usually trigger something on death, figure it out!
The enchant has a &apositive&r and a &4negative&r drawback, 1 for 1 right?
The weapon is infused with a certain &5effect&r or &econdition&r, for example
I mean, it is &ainfused&r after all, "dipping" would be a far better word but bow enchants already have this sadly :(
Gives you enough experience so that you can play the pack while not being brainless.
Okay kidding aside, it enhances XP gain in general, I mean what else could experience mean?
And no, this doesn't mean you can put linggango in your resume experiences.
This would help with getting access to &9advanced&r and &elegendary&r enchants.
I mean the name says it all, it's for blades, blade blade blade, swords.
&eI swear if someone asks if this is&r
&efor bows I'm gonna lose it bro.&r
Usually helps with normal gameplay outside of combat, feel free to browse through which one would specifically help you.
This essentially applies an &5effect&r on you based on enchant conditions.
I mean, this is why it's called coating, right?

ftbquests.chapter.charm_tierlist_2.quest: A long claw of the dead that helps you reach!
In your fight with the Sniffer, you picked up his martial arts and can inflict more damage now!
Cosine... but with extra steps
Never make a deal with the devil...
The fur of the mighty sniffers, 100%% real!
The gods award you with powers the luckier you are.
Seal of god
Pick a card... any card
Huge armor boost, in cost of movement.
Fuel yourself with pain and convert it into anger.
After months of hard work, you feel like you've mastered your techniques. You can handle weapons with ease and efficiency!
This ancient pendant is said to bring great fortune.
An old legend states that this belt was worn by Poseidon once...
A Warden's eye, protects you against the terrors of the dark.
The void's treasure! Shields you from negative effects and can save you from death... if it's on your side.
You have become adept at slaying those who stand against you.
Would you let a die decide your fate?
Only those who wandered the heavens witnessed it all.
Forged in the depths of the underworld caves, this golden ring makes you stronger.
Embrace the hasty winds!
90%% of gamblers quit before they hit big.
A precious ring that empowers you.
Piglins are your friends!
It watches over you... and acknowledges. Thee is satisfied with your efforts and awards you with power.
The ocean's heart pulsates with power, allowing you to become one with the water.
A mage's wet dream!
Infinite healing???
Heart imbued with regenerative abilities.
Your darkness swallowed up my sun? who decided that.
The warmth cover of the sun fills you up with strength.
An absolute must for an exam.
This stone was brewed in the raging volcanoes of the depthy mountains.
Super Sniffer's anklet!
Only those who proved their worth to the cursed gods can wield this amulet.
Glasses but with aura.
This spellstone enhances your defensive capabilities.
A stone used by blacksmits to sharpen blades. Very strong!
Not even the elder guardian's presence can stop you from mining.
If you are gambling alot, I suggest this.
A ring forged by the dark entities who tried to mimic you and failed miserably.
Take away the things you don't like in life.,
Wrist support to push your enemies further!
Prismatic... Chicken?
What happens when you study too much tech...
Siphon your opponent's life.
Too cool to be blinded by the cameras.
You can sew yourself out of any situation. These threads are imbued with magical powers!
Only true heroes may receive this emblem.
Harvest the power of the mighty dimensions!
See during night time with these infinite battery goggles!
No more looking at the stars, you can fly on one!
Become one with the forge and smith like a true master!
After his fall, Arion's heart seemed to radiate with energy.
A bag filled with poisonous spores... they seem to help you in your battles.
An ancient clock that was frozen in tine... it seems to have grown magical properties.
The house always wins!
This old hook helps you annihilate your enemies with efficiency, rewarding you with more experience.
Can't pick a spellstone? This one has ALL
How greedy?
Damage and defense at same time?!!
After many battles, your amulet is starting to evolve together with you.
Prove your HUNGER for power to the gods.
Crafted with mighty ingots from the Iron Colossus.
Keep an eye on the market.
The nature calls your name.
Red, or blue pill?
The ring of titans, wear this for extra health!
Mythical Bracelets filled with the wrath of the Gods
How do you carry all of those charms? Belt.
A leprechauns hat. You feel luckier
A big diamond shield which gives you passive resistance!
This necklace has been imbued by the highest of Priests, you suddenly feel more invincible!
A radiant ring to make you stronger. If you listen closely, you can hear the echoing screams of the cataclysm...
The souls of the skeletons guide you to survive even the most dire situations.
You've learned how to tap in to your lucky senses.
Not once, not twice... but THREE times??!
The power of the void shields you.
This weird hood protects you from starvation..
Loot goblin!
Heart of the mystical dragons who soared the skies
Sugary drink which makes you get the zoomies!
The full moon rises!
Crazy damage boost
Gloves but... with passion.
This item is very dangerous, if a lightning strikes you, you will lose your items.
A broken machine engine... careful so you don't accidentally power it up.
Careful... or they will get feral again.
You have been through a lot and yet you yearn for more pain to become stronger.
This mask oozes with cursed energy... be careful how you use it.
Target... lucky practice?
Did you say you stole this from Gob?
An extra hand with extra fingers?
Sine... but with extra steps
This small totem represents a new life. A one time save from death.
Perhaps you could still use it.
A smile a day makes you stronger each time :)
Wrap yourself in 10 layers of warm luck.
Fancy earrings!
Crafted with mighty ingots from the Iron Colossus.
Feeling lucky? Double damage!
You feel healthier!
Who likes their food bland anyways?
Refined by the Queen Bee's workers. This antidote gets rid of all sicknesses in no time!
This relic holds a hidden power... perhaps a ritual could unlock its full potential.
Shiny, powerful!
You feel a cold chill as the night howls at you...
Your prayers have been answered, and the angels have acknowledged you. You can soar through the winds!
Do you dare?
Remember the Math lessons you hated?
An archer's dream...
This is what the people used in the ancient coal mines. It was said to give them inhuman powers.
A double-edged blade.
BYE-BYE ARMOR!!!
How else would you be able to run for this long?
Indulge in pain and become stronger.
Multiply your damage!
Maybe it has some uses...
Needle infused with your blood.
A wither skeleton's spine, can protect you against withering.
The gloves of the Grand Duelist!
Mad Scientist.
Meep Meep!
The final crown forged from the breath of the dying gods. The air trembles at your presence, and their whispers play in your head. They are all watching you...
The dark powers help you in your fights and protect you from incoming damage.
Fancy way to execute your enemies
Fragments of stone infused with devastating flames.
Luck can sometimes protect you from harm!
Some cream with regenerative abilities! Don't ask where it came from.
Not the type of milk you'd expect...
Strip your armor and embrace the true strength of the might golems.
Luck of the draw.
Perfect accessory to bring to your enemies' funeral. Careful, very spiky!
After travelling for so long, you have become stronger... but sometimes sitting down can help you rest.
Who would've thought a cape can protect you so much...
You took some boxing classes, and now your hits are more devastating!
A device that powers your defenses when you need to.
The ring of titans, wear this for extra health!
The rage grows within you...
A precious gem imbued with the souls of your enemies. You feel your health coming back!
A die powered by dark magic... when luck is on your side, you don't feel anything!
Alt F4's little brother
Eldorath seemed to drop this when he perished.
Stronger Pets
This magic cloud empowers your jumps, 1 step closer to the heavens!
A chocolate piece wont hurt, right?
Soft like the feathers of a bird.
Throw a die to gamble with life or death.

ftbquests.chapter.companions.quest10FEBD: &nChocolate&r gives you speed when you walk on it.
&nStrawberry&r gives you regeneration when you walk on it.
&nVanilla&r gives you resistance when you walk on it.
Let's start by making a &6BIG Bread&r by combining a &6Homunculus&r and &f8&r Bread.
Enemies will receive weakness as well.
Then put it in the &6Big Furnace&r and wait.. eventually a croissant will pop out. Wait for it to hatch.
After a while, a &6Croissant Dragon&r will hatch! To make it stronger and bigger, feed it milk. &f4&r buckets is enough to max it out.
Croissant Dragon slows down your enemies by creaming on them..? Yes.. sorry!
You can change its cream type by crafting different armors such as: &aCroissant Dragon Vanilla, Chocolate, or Strawberry Armor&r.
Use big bread on soul furnace
ftbquests.chapter.companions.quest1161E3: And into a Gargoyle in &5The End&r dimension.
You can trade with them using the &6coins&r of that dimension to obtain rare items.
Imp can spawn in &6The Nether&r in a new tent structure.
Minions have different attack patterns depending on their form.
If you upgrade a chain to a &8Netherite Chain&r, you can force a minion to stay in its current form.
There's a chance to tame them into a minion by giving them a &cNether Coin&r.
If you fail... they will try to attack you!
The minion changes forms in different dimensions, such as turning blue in &aThe Overworld&r.
Give nether coin to a imp
ftbquests.chapter.companions.quest19C4D0: Can be used to upgrade Netherite armor into a new set.
You'll need &cDemon Flesh&r for that though, which can be obtained by slaying mobs in the Nether.
When your &chealth&r is below half, it will reduce incoming damage based on the armor worn.
ftbquests.chapter.companions.quest296B4A: The &6Great Chalice&r holds essences, which can be dropped by &cmobs&r or crafted from rare items.
&eThese essences are placed into the chalice to fill it up.&r
A &6Filled Grail&r is an useful item needed for certain recipes in the game.
&eGo to the next page to view information about a Soul Furnace&r
Just like the &6Great Chalice&r, it has to be filled with essences. Place the &6Soul Furnace&r below of the &6Great Chalice&r to fill it!
The &6Soul Furnace&r can cook special items, such as:
ftbquests.chapter.companions.quest2982B1: Right-click the &eRespawn Totem&r with the &bHourglass&r to activate it.
Companions that died nearby will respawn instantly!
&eOh, there's also one thing I didn't tell you about, summoning new companions from the Respawn Totem! :O&r
&bAfter you've defeated the Pontiff and obtained the special items, you can craft a &eRespawn Totem&r &bthat can revive your companions!&r
&eThat will spawn a &bMankh&e in its place.&r
&eThis companion generates rings of fire and shoots lasers from its position. (It can't move.)&r
&bRight-clicking with &6Old Cloth&b summons a Cloak in its place instead.&r
&eThis creature launches sacred stars that explode on impact, causing damage.&r
&eIt can also turn you and itself invisible!&r
&eWhen used, Golden Naginatas fall onto the target to cause damage.&r
&eIf you sneak, you will hit the target more precisely but with fewer Naginatas.&r
To respawn them, you need to craft an &bHourglass&r!
ftbquests.chapter.companions.quest309816: &eShade Altars&r can be used to summon two new companions.
To summon one of them you have to create a &eShade Sword Altar&r.
You'll also need a &eShadow Bell&r, which can be linked to the altar. The altar requires &cCrystallized Blood&r as energy to operate.
Once it has enough &cCrystallized Blood&r, use the linked bell to summon!
The sword floats around and deals massive damage.
ftbquests.chapter.companions.quest446059: In certain loot chests you can find a &6Copper Coin&r, which can be used with &eFrog Bonanza&r!
&6Coins&r can also be placed on the floor as decoration.
You basically gamble with a slot machine- I mean, &eFrog Bonanza&r.
If you're very lucky, you can obtain some really nice loot!
If you're unlucky... &cbad things&r may happen, refrain from gambling in your base..
ftbquests.chapter.companions.quest4ACD5D: &aCopper Coins&r make him summon firework frogs that shoot explosive projectiles.
&cNether Coins&r make him summon a fighter holding a sword.
&dEnd Coins&r make him summon a flying projectile-shooting frog.
He's a good-looking fella who can be found in &nswamp&r biomes.
You can also play blackjack with him by bidding coins in his menu.. &8lol&r
He istamed very.. weirdly in my opinion.
To tame Cornelius you have to kill a bee near him, or make him kill one by dragging a bee close to him.
On his own, Cornelius doesn't attack, but with coins you can make him call his goons.
Certain coins affect the summon system differently.
ftbquests.chapter.companions.quest4D84A7: FTB Quests may not count as you taming them, so just cope for now!
ftbquests.chapter.companions.quest57CA4A: You basically get more items \& extra spin chances with these rarer coins.
ftbquests.chapter.companions.quest5C4290: It's a Minecraft mod that introduces a world of &5magical&r constructs, &aquirky allies&r, and a &cboss fight&r.
The mobs are really useful and fun to have around, enjoy the mod!
ftbquests.chapter.companions.quest5E5484: &8Don't forget to give it the staff too!&r
On its own the mage doesn't do anything, so we need to give it magical spell books!
Right-click while sneaking on the mage to open the menu.
These books can be found in loot chests, obtained by bartering with imps, or pulled from the gambling machine.
Once the spell books are equipped, the mage can use spells!
&e&lExtra tip:&r &eIf you cook a candle in the Soul Furnace you can make totems for your mage and save it from death!&r
They spawn in swamps and can be a companion.
&eYou can use the spell books yourself too!
&bIce Shards&r create hovering ice shards that pierce through a target to freeze it.
&bIce Tornado&r invokes a freezing tornado that deals damage along its path.
&bFire Mark&r temporarily marks an enemy, causing an explosion if set on fire.
&bBlaze&r launches a small burst of fire towards a target to ignite it.
&bHeal Ring&r creates a ring around you that quickly heals you.
&bStone Spikes&r create spikes beneath your target to cause damage.
&bMagic Ray&r shoots a focused beam of magic that damages entities in its path.
&bBlack Hole&r creates a distortion that pulls all nearby enemies to its center.
However, to do this, you need to craft &6Mage's Clothes&r for it to wear, which also tames it.
After you craft the mage outfit, right-click the &6Golden Allay&r to tame it and turn it into a mage!
Interact the Golden Allay with Mage clothes
ftbquests.chapter.companions.quest5F3B41: &eAlso make sure to loot the temple
His structure can be found in the jungle.
To start the fight, you must interrupt his prayer, which will cause him to attack you.
Defeating him will reward you with two special items that you can use
For some reason, I really want to call him Polnareff instead
ftbquests.chapter.companions.quest6736CF: ### &eTeddy&r
[gap=5]
Related to teddy, you can craft a &6Netherite Dagger&r using copper and netherite.
[gap=5]
[gap=5]
Combining it with &cNetherrack&r creates a tool that produces an eternal flame.
[gap=5]
[gap=5]
If you light teddy on fire, it will mutate and turn into an angel that gives you constant regeneration!
A &6Teddy Tower&r is a new structure that can be found in the Dark Forest biome.
Be careful though, there are vindicators and witches inside!
At the top floor you will find a teddy bear. To tame it you need to craft a &6Needle&r.
After crafting it, simply right-click the teddy to tame it :D
Now let's see what teddy can do!
Teddy attacks with its needle, causing an effect that makes needles pierce its target.
[gap=5]
&6I need a hug
Use needle on teddy
Craft eternal lighter and use it on teddy (OPTIONAL)
Tame Teddy
ftbquests.chapter.companions.quest77F2F5: ### &eDinamo&r
&l&eFirst&r, craft a &eHomunculus&r and get &f29&r planks. Use them on Dinamo's broken body to repair it, and after you've used all of them craft a wrench and wake Dinamo up!
&l&eSecond&r, you will need &f29&r Iron and a &eTesla Coil&r. After giving it the required materials you will completely fix him!
Now let's see what Dinamo can do!
### &eDinamo's usage&r
While following you, it shoots electricity at nearby enemies to protect you.
[gap=5]
[gap=5]
It can also interact with certain blocks mainly made of iron and planks, such as &eVoltaic Pillar&r, &eTesla Coil&r, &eVoltaic Relay&r and &ePlasma Lamp&r.
[gap=5]
Can be found in the factory structure, you'll have to find it yourself, sorry!
[gap=5]
While sitting, it conducts electricity which you can connect to certain blocks with a &eWrench&r, allowing you to chain connect blocks.
[gap=5]
[gap=5]
Lastly, there's a special block I didn't mention! It's called a &aRecall Platform&r, which lets you teleport between platforms powered by Dinamo!
[gap=0]
This factory is overrun by pillagers so be aware!
After you clear out the pillagers, try finding a &ebroken doll&r on the ground. That's &eDinamo&r.
&l&eHOWEVER&r&r if you don't want to waste your precious time to find him, you can alternatively do a raid!
Dinamos spawn in raids and attack you.
&l&eANYWAYS&r back to the Dinamo lying on the ground.
### &eNow let's repair Dinamo!&r
&6Enemies to friends
&6Stage I of fixing Dinamo
Tame Dinamo
ftbquests.chapter.companions.quest7876B7: &eShade Altars&r can be used to summon two new companions.
The &eShade Maw&r primarily serves as a mount that can quickly traverse terrain.
It can also go underwater, holding you in its mouth to prevent oxygen loss.
It can also attack when left-clicked while mounted!
ftbquests.chapter.companions.quest7D27ED: &n&eSecond stage:&r It turns into a rolling ball that helps you in combat.
&n&eThird stage:&r It grows wings and you can glide while riding it. It also gains a diving attack that deals nice damage.
&n&eFourth stage:&r It attacks with its fangs and shoots hot sand projectiles.
The antlion is a giant ant that spawns in &ndeserts&r.
&7An Hourglass can be used to cycle through phases!&r
If you get too close it will burrow itself into the ground and shoot burning projectiles at you.
To tame it, you must approach silently and carefully, then feed it &cCrystallized Blood&r.
After you tame it, the mob will evolve into 4 stages and cycles through them once a day.
&n&eFirst stage:&r It grows some fur which you should shear, as you can use it to craft items.
ftbquests.chapter.companions.quest85CD9D: ### &ePuppet&r
Cobblestone-Shears-Paper.&r
After right-clicking with any of the represented items, you can start the game!
The game rules are simple, you have to beat glove three times. If it beats you, it will punch you.
After beating the glove, craft an empty puppet and right-click on the glove with it.
&8Empty puppet can also be found in factories and other structures.&r
[gap=5]
[gap=5]
Once the puppet is assembled, you can craft special items to make it stronger!
&eLike&r Mutant Arm, Blade Arm, Whip Arm (?), Cannon Arm.
He can be found in a structure located in the &2swamp biome&r.
[gap=5]
[gap=5]
Each arm has its own characteristics, allowing you to personalize your very own puppet.
[gap=5]
[gap=5]
This place is home to Illusioners and Witches so be careful again!
On the top floor you should see a gloor sweeping the floor.
In order to tame it, you have to play &dRock-Paper-Scissors&r &ewith him!
In order to represent each object you need
&6Personal Assistant
Interact with Magic Glove.
Tame Puppet
