ftbquests.chapter.composite_materials.qu: This material can turn &eleather armor into primitive armor.&r Which is a massive upgrade over leather.. of course.
It can also upgrade the &eflint tools we had before into primitive tools!&r
&8[Click to read]
&n&6End-game tools&r
Etherite Tools have incredibly high stats. To read all of them, check out the items tooltips!
&8[Click to read]
&bEtherite Toolset
Use a cardboard box pick-up the spawners! Then bring it to home, and throw &dobsidian steel ingot&r on it.
There's a chance it will convert into &adungeon steel ingot!
&8[Click to read]
Breaking a Spawner
The armor has the same attributes as diamond but higher enchantability.
Wearing the armor will also make you neutral with the piglins.
&8[Click to read]
Any obsidian armor
Obsidian Armor Set
&6Super Efficiency:&r These tools can break up x64 of the same type block in an area.
&8[Click to read]
Any Allay Tool
This weapon has the ability to cause aquatic mobs to drop extra resources.
&8[Click to read]
Can be crafted with various aquatic materials
The tools are a mix of gold and diamond, though with less durability than the latter.
&8[Click to read]
Any obsidian tool
Obsidian Toolset
&6&nEnlightened Book&r
To use this item, hold it in your main hand and place the piece of equipment you want to upgrade in your off-hand. Right-click to enchant the gear based on your current XP level.
Each attempt costs 3 XP levels and includes a random chance to grant rare treasure enchantments.
&8Note: This process does not work if you are using a two-handed weapon.&r
&8[Click to read]
&6&nDuplichanted Book&r
To use this item, hold it in your main hand and place the Enchanted Book you wish to copy in your off-hand. Right-click to successfully duplicate the book.
&aNote: This process is fully compatible with two-handed weapons with the new 6.5 update.&r
&8[Click to read]
The Sealer heals you for part of the damage dealt, with a chance to drop spawn eggs from the mob.
The chance increases with looting.
&8[Click to read]
Echoium Armor set has better attributes than netherite, grants you additional hearts, and grants darkness, even blindness immunity!
- &6Aura Monster:&r Wardens won't spawn near you.
- &6Fire Immunity:&r You won't take fire damage.
- &6Strong Will.&r Immune to weakness effect.
&8[Click to read]
Echoium Armor Set
The Seeker gets stronger by devouring your XP.
The Breaker is a special pickaxe that allows you to mine mob spawners.
&8[Click to read]
Makes any item in your off-hand unbreakable.
Can also work just normal as a totem of undying, but with a cooldown instead of breaking.
Fires wither skulls that deal nice amount of damage, can be buffed with full etherite armor set!
&8[Click to read]
Now it's craftable!
&6&nReinforced Book&r
Hold this book in your main hand and place an enchanted item in your off-hand. Right-click to upgrade all existing enchantments on that item.

This upgrade only applies to enchantments that do not have a default maximum cap of level 1. It allows you to push eligible enchantments up to an additional 4 levels beyond their normal maximum limits.
&8Note: This process does not work if you are using a two-handed weapon.&r
&8[Click to read]
The Opresser heals you whenever a enemy heals near you.
&8[Click to read]
The Devourer gets stronger with every unique mob you kill. Scaling up to 40+
When charged, shoots the Sonic Boom Ability that &bThe Warden&r uses.
This staff benefits from the Echoium Armor set and deals up to &e3X&r more damage.
&8[Click to read]
The Judge takes the hp of the last mob you killed and empowers your next attack.
Obtained Through mixing with &6Create
&6&nSepachanted Book&r

Hold this book in your main hand and place an enchanted item in your off-hand. Right-click to successfully isolate and separate the very first enchantment from the off-hand item, removing it from the gear.
&8Note: This process does not work if you are using a two-handed weapon.&r
&8[Click to read]
&cThe Elder Guardian&r was once the fierce protector of the ocean, though now it is, simply put, an old fish.
Anyways, we need to kill this boss in order to get a required material.
&8[Click to read]
&cKill&r The Elder Guardian
&n&6End-game Armors&r
Etherite Armor have incredibly high stats. To read all of them, check out the items tooltips!
&8[Click to read]
&bEtherite Armor Set
&6&nDisenchanting Book&r

To use this item, hold it in your main hand and place a piece of enchanted equipment in your off-hand. Right-click to completely transfer all of the existing enchantments from the gear onto an Enchanted Book.
&8[Click to read]
&6&nComposite Materials&r
Composite Materials is a massive mod that introduces a wide array of new tools, armor sets, and unique mechanics.
Because the gear obtained through this mod is exceptionally powerful, this dedicated questline is designed to guide you cleanly through its progression.
&8[Click to read]
Okay!
Composite Materials!
The armor only provides small amount of armor, but has a lot of armor toughness.
- &6Tanky:&r Extra lot of HP
- &6Athletic:&r %%20 increased swim speed
- &6Long Arms:&r +1 block reach
- &6Strong Immune System:&r A lot of bad effect immunities.
&8[Click to read]
Primitive Armor Set
If you hit a mob with the bow, then hit another one with the arrow, you can make them fight eachother!
Pretty confusing..
&8[Click to read]
Beheader heals you whenever you kill an enemy with the weapon.
It also has a chance to drop mobs head, increases with every fortune level.
&8[Click to read]
The armor has medium durability but less armor toughness, even less than diamond.
- &6Fall Damage Negation:&r It can negate fall damage, give you %%10 move speed with each armor piece.
- &6Immunity to Negativity:&r You also become immune to wither, poison and hunger damage, recover quickly aswell!
&8[Click to read]
Any Allay Armor Piece
When thrown near an activated conduit, it will turn into a Abyss Fang.
&8[Click to read]
Obtained by killing a Elder Guardian
The last material to cover is Perkin, made from end-game items.
&6&nEvolutium
Obtained by using an Enlightened Book to enlighten the Infused Perkin when your XP level is 120 or higher.
Composite Material
&8[Click to read]
The last material to cover is Etherite, made from end-game items.
Lacerator is not a normal bow. It's damage increases by how long you draw it.
If you hold it for a &elong time&r, you will deal a &cCRAZY&r amount of damage.
&8[Click to read]
The attributes are way higher than netherite.
Primitive Tools are even better with the more HP you got.
&8[Click to read]
Primitive Tools
This material can turn &eleather armor into primitive armor.&r Which is a massive upgrade over leather.. of course.
It can also upgrade the &eflint tools we had before into primitive tools!&r
&8[Click to read]
&cThe Warden&r rests deep under the ground.
It resides a strange and worrying fauna that reacts to sounds. Don't make too much noise or you might wake it up.
Overworld / Ancient City
Kill &cThe Warden&r
This item can be used along with echo shards and diamond to craft an Echoium Ingot.
&8[Click to read]
Obtained by dropping obsidian steel ingot on a spawner.
Every tool has better attributes than netherite.
- &6Punishing Heavy Armor:&r Deals additional damage based on the opponents armor while ignoring it!
&8[Click to read]
Echoium Toolset
&6&nAncient Book&r
This utility item features two distinct modes of operation based on its current enchantment state:
&e1. Unenchanted State:&r Right-click to absorb all existing enchantments from the item held in your off-hand.
&e2. Enchanted State:&r Right-click to consume a portion of the book's durability, releasing and transferring all of its stored enchantments directly onto the item held in your off-hand.

If duplicate enchantments conflict during a transfer, only the modifier with the highest level will be retained. Keep in mind that enchantments can only be successfully transferred onto valid, compatible equipment.
&8Note: This function does not work if you are using a two-handed weapon.&r
&8[Click to read]
Holding Right-Click will shoot a fire. If you are in the Nether dimension, you will shoot fireballs instead.
&8[Click to read]
Allay will die in this process... :c!!
Obtained by giving a dungeon steel ingot to a allay.
The Thumper deals damage based on the distance fallen and negates fall damage.
Basically a better version of the mace.
&8[Click to read]
ftbquests.chapter.create.image.hovertext: Questlines are the exclusive property of Misanthropy. [DISCORD USER - @Misanthropy]
No part of these questlines may be utilized, redistributed, or modified for any project other than Linggango without explicit written permission from the owner.
Unauthorized use or theft of this content is strictly prohibited and protected under copyright law.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest10331210B1: Copycat blocks let you turn almost any material into steps, panels, and other shapes normally impossible to craft.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest12830AA7C4: Drilling machine: A device used to extract resources from deep underground.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest12913E20A8: Allows for the creation of contraptions that move up and down.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest12C789BF2D: When placed in front of the Encased Fan this allows it to smoke items.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest13232A19D4: The Package Frogport is your automated delivery hub.
It works with Chain Conveyors and Packagers to send and receive cardboard packages.
To get started, place a Chain Conveyor, right-click the chain, and follow the on-screen guide to position the Frogport correctly.
It must be aligned with the chain to enable package transfers.
Every package must have a destination Frogport.
Without a receiving port at the other end, the package won’t be delivered and the transfer will fail.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest138F3EB263: The block that deals with train assembly and dissasembly.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest13D4FF6929: Extends block placing, destroying range. Builders Best Friend!
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest155F388D56: Auto-cuts trees, plants and much more. Excellent for automating farming!
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest155FBDDA1C: Lets you turn off parts of contraptions while they are formed.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest16B919B6EB: Again kinetic energy but turns more precisely.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest16CD1CC9F7: Can halve or double the rotational speed of connected chaindrives when it receives a redstone signal.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest1742597D48: Create is a steampunk mod that lets you build contraptions to do most things you can think of.
Because of this, the chapter is mostly focused on letting you know what exists and giving you a rough outline of the progression of the mod.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest1864600225: Craft a netherite drill to mine the most powerful and rare resources.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest19166D31F2: Basically a sign.. that can update the text though.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest19183F380B: A versatile machine that can pull and push entities, as well as wash, haunt, blast, and smoke items.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest1A541F8D6F: When placed in front of the Encased Fan this allows it to wash the item.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest1AA9DCC32A: Collect raw redstone to advance in your mining and crafting progress.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest1BB020EAC2: By putting a knife or something else on this block can automatate processes like slicing.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest1C2A5AF20B: When powered, shows the time and plays a tune twice a day.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest1CE6DB5F87: Chutes are used to transfer between inventories vertically.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest1FA87B6769: The Redstone Requester links redstone to logistics.
Connected to a Stock Link or Ticker, it requests up to 9 items (256 each) when powered, delivering them in Cardboard Packages.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest219E307B85: Reverses the direction of rotation when a redstone signal is applied.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest21DD4EFBB3: Upgraded version of a Copper Backtank
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest21E30871E9: An advanced item distributor that moves items to specific reachable points.It won’t work if the arm can’t reach and requires SUs to operate.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest2246A107EC: This machine automatically builds structures from your schematic paper. Just load it with gunpowder, materials, and a clipboard to track everything, and it does the rest.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest227597F357: Allows for the extraction of liquids from items.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest274ADEE111: Cheat Code of create, Hydraulic Transmission allows you to simply make any connection between units N' cogwheels.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest293196C72E: Lets you clear and pave while riding a train.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest29649C6541: A precise lever, can do several levels.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest2965172775: A Cog Crank works like a Hand Crank, but it’s used to apply rotational force and direction to cogwheels.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest29EFF7AED6: Lets you instantly break most Create blocks by shift + right-clicking. And rotate them by right-clicking.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest2A128A8CDD: Decorate your factory or home with these beautiful decals!
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest2AB0806AA6: An upgraded version of Copper Diving Helmet.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest2BAF5C0938: A useful block for building contraptions.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest2BC564546A: Allows for contraptions that rotate around a point in space, particularly useful for farms.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest2C5BDB5E97: Extractor: A tool designed to process raw resources extracted by the drilling machine.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest2C8EF8E651: In order to get brass you're going to need to heat a mechanical mixer that mixes copper and zinc!
&8The Empty Blaze burner can be filled by right-clicking it on either a blaze spawner or a blaze.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest2CC43C68A8: It's really confusing but the strongest!
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest2D0B2D0166: Potato Cannons are a classic weapon to have, just remember to have suitable ammo in your inventory or this thing is useless.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest2DFDE04D13: Craft a sample drill to begin your excavation journey.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest2E10D93D92: An item used to craft more advanced mechanical items.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest2EDAEA1566: The Stock Link is the backbone of the Logistics Network, connecting Packagers, Stock Tickers, and other logistics blocks.
Placing a Stock Link creates a network; right-clicking another before placing links them into a shared system with no range limit.
Attach a Stock Link to a Packager, and its inventory becomes accessible to any Ticker, Requester, or Keeper on the network — no belts, funnels, or tunnels needed.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest2FC525A271: Craft a diamond drill to reach deeper ores and more valuable resources.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest2FD45285C3: A useful block for building contraptions.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest306E0A1DA8: A redstone component that outputs a signal when in contact with another redstone contact. Perticularly useful for building contraptions.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest312320F8FF: An upgraded version of the Copper Diving Boots.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest3163768E54: A windmill uses wind to spin and generate Stress Units (SU) for your machines.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest335ECE39B2: Andesite alloy is made from some iron nugget and andesite block.
The starting point of your create questline.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest36DF8B86E1: Planetary Gearset will output more RPM per spin
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest37760181A2: Allows you to copy paste schematics
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest3887DB2CA5: A useful block for building contraptions.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest39E3CD4A91: View the item or just go crazy.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest39E865F0D7: A Shaft is a simple but essential machine part that transfers rotational power. You can extend it to reach multiple contraptions and keep them all moving.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest3B10D31EFD: Lets you create your own custom functional clock.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest3B925864D2: Blocks that allow contraptions to harvest crops.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest3C7A3E5D5E: The Stock Ticker automates redstone based on inventory levels.
Connected to a Stock Link, it monitors an item and emits a redstone signal based on total stock.
Paired with a Seat or Blaze Burner, the mob becomes a Stock Keeper with full network access.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest3D11842DDD: -&eSU (Stress Units)&r Is what powers your contraptions.
-&eRPM (Revolutions per minute)&r is basically working speed of contraptions.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest3DE3863665: Redstone is essential in Create, and these blocks let you build more compact contraptions.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest3EADB5F22F: An upgrade for the Andesite Tunnel that provides more control over how items are handled.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest3F7792256B: Craft a vein finder to locate ore veins and enhance mining efficiency.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest4007D36163: Grinding it all down to dust. Like wheat to bread.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest408D9361AF: A simple machine with massive potential. Can place blocks but also use items on blocks or entities.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest410BEC9893: Cogwheels are used to adjust rotational speed or extend contraptions.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest4206216A5F: Mechanical belts transport items straight or diagonally. Attach a shaft to each end to connect them.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest44C3B26280: Allows for movement of structures linearly using rotational force.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest44E0DDEE05: A multi-block item storage that can't be accessed manually, only with create funnels etc.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest48E5D56C47: The thing your train goes on.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest49EE6F88CD: When placed in front of the Encased Fan this allows it to blast items. // like a furnace
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest4A7401194C: The item hatch allows for easy emptying of your inventory into any chest, vault, or other inventory!
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest4E0503134B: A block that can monitor the fill levels of inventories and tanks.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest4E7983B3E5: Collect raw emeralds to gather even more valuable materials.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest4E83447771: Allows you to control the train.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest4F61B1F3D1: The main block used for fluid storage.
The main block to tunnel liquids.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest50C0D23949: Stops rotational force from passing through when powered by a redstone signal.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest52C1D5727A: Tunnels are used to control the flow of items on belts.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest541988089F: A redstone component that toggles its state with every redstone pulse.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest5611FCC583: Lets you set up a sequence of rotations that trigger when the block receives a redstone signal.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest5BFBACBB23: Andesite is a common underground stone that blends well with regular stone, you’ll need plenty for machinery.
Also in order to make a andesite casing, Right click to a &nstripped&r log with andesite alloy on your hand.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest5CDDAD4D40: A redstone component that extends a pulse to a configurable amount.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest5D09866187: A block that can look for specific items in the world or in inventories.
ftbquests.chapter.create.quest5E04B024C8: Used for filling items with fluids and crafting certain items using fluids.

ftbquests.chapter.create_connected.quest: The Inverted Clutch does the exact opposite of a normal clutch.
The Inverted Gearshift reverses the input rotation when unpowered and passes it through unchanged when powered, basically opposite of a normal gearshift.
Haunting and Smoking Catalysts channel the Nether’s power-soul fire for spectral conversions, and burning embers for smoke and cooking.
Made from soul sand and netherrack, these catalysts let you tame a darker side of processing.
The Fluid Vessel holds the same amount as a regular tank but in a horizontal layout, ideal for low, wide builds or storage under machines.
Check the ponders, i really can't explain them...
The Item Silo functions like a regular Item Vault but stacks items vertically instead of spreading out. Ideal for compact or tall storage builds.
Every upgrade starts somewhere. The Empty Fan Catalyst is the uncharged core-full of potential.
You’ll need it to make all the specialized catalysts that transform your fans into focused processing tools.
To make one of the catalysts below, simply right click the empty catalyst with the proper item in your hand!
Check the Ponder for the Sequenced Pulse Generator to learn more about its advanced redstone logic.
The Shear Pin acts like a regular shaft but breaks instantly if the connected network is overstressed, serving as a failsafe for important components.
The Overstress Clutch disengages automatically with a delay whenever the system becomes overstressed.
The Brake works oppositely: when powered by redstone, it injects massive stress into the system, crashing it instantly.
The Kinetic Bridge lets you transfer Stress Units (SU) from one network to a completely separate Stress Network.
Charges up with rotational power, then later can be used as a battery!
Two forces, with one goal: better processing.
Blasting Catalysts perform blasting encased fan recipes, while Washing Catalysts perform washing encased fan recipes.
Master them both to expand your automation capabilities.
Born from dreams and shaped by extremes-Seething and Freezing Catalysts bring even higher (and lower) temperatures to fan automation.
To view the recipes they can perform, check the uses of the Industrial Fan-which must be used to make these catalysts function.
Create Connected enhances Create with smarter, more versatile components.
Use Fan Catalysts for easier fan processing, specialized clutches and gearboxes to reverse motion, and built-in cogwheels for more efficient machine connections.
These clutches engage only under certain conditions, making them ideal for automation based on speed or rotation direction.
Centrifugal Clutch: engages only when input RPM exceeds a set threshold, delaying connection until the system speeds up.
Freewheel Clutch: connects only when spinning in the correct direction, letting you control motion based on rotational flow.
Inventory Access Port: connects to a single inventory, allowing direct item insertion or extraction — perfect for compact setups.
Inventory Bridge: links two inventories as one, letting you move items in or out of both using pipes or funnels.

ftbquests.chapter.create_new_age.quest14: Once you’ve energized an Iron Block, use a Deployer to place the Overcharged Iron Block onto your Magnetite.
Doing so will form the Redstone Magnet, the first step in channeling focused magnetic power.
ftbquests.chapter.create_new_age.quest15: If u think motor is not enough, use extensions! Attach it to behind.
ftbquests.chapter.create_new_age.quest18: Overcharged Iron Wire is the second conductive material in Create: New Age.
It transfers 2,048 SU/tick, double that of Copper Wire, making it a reliable choice for expanding power networks.
Magnetite is the cornerstone of magnetic energy.
Found deep within caves around Y50 or Y70!
ftbquests.chapter.create_new_age.quest1B: Placed between the Fuel Inserter and Heat Vent, these rods enable fission and transfer heat through the reactor core.
ftbquests.chapter.create_new_age.quest25: Attach it to a behind of a motor
ftbquests.chapter.create_new_age.quest29: The Basic Solar Plate introduces thermal energy.
ftbquests.chapter.create_new_age.quest2C: The Reactor Casing is the first step for making nuclear reactors.
You’ll need many to build the outer shell, forming the structural base for fuel rods.
ftbquests.chapter.create_new_age.quest3F: Progression demands power. Energize a Gold Block, then deploy it onto a Redstone Magnet to create a Layered Magnet.
Gold is better at conducting power - expect stronger results and a higher SU cost.
ftbquests.chapter.create_new_age.quest47: To start energizing, craft a Basic Energizer using an Andesite Casing and Lightning Rod.
Provide it with rotation and energy, attach an Electrical Connector to the Carbon Brushes set to Pull, and another connector on the side/top set to Push.
ftbquests.chapter.create_new_age.quest55: Reactor Glass is a stylish alternative to Reactor Casings, letting you see inside your nuclear setup without losing structural strength.
Place 12 Magnetite blocks around a Generator Coil as shown in the Ponder screen.
ftbquests.chapter.create_new_age.quest59: Overcharged Diamond Wire is the fourth conductive material in Create: New Age.
It transfers 8,192 SU/tick, making it ideal for late-game machines and high-throughput setups.
ftbquests.chapter.create_new_age.quest5A: The Strong Motor is the next step in converting FE to SU, producing 2,048 SU at 256 RPM.
ftbquests.chapter.create_new_age.quest5B: The Reinforced Motor is the top-tier motor in Create New Age, outputting 8,192 SU and storing 128K FE.
No extension for this one gng..
ftbquests.chapter.create_new_age.quest5C: Create: New Age adds electricity, letting you build real-world inspired machines.
ftbquests.chapter.create_new_age.quest62: Obtained by energizing iron blocks or ingots.
ftbquests.chapter.create_new_age.quest68: The Reinforced Energizer boosts production massively — 4× faster than the Advanced Energizer with a 1M SU buffer, designed for high-throughput energizing.
ftbquests.chapter.create_new_age.quest6A: Copper Wire is the first conductive material in Create: New Age, transferring up to 1,024 SU/tick.
It’s easy to craft and perfect for small-scale setups and early power distribution.
ftbquests.chapter.create_new_age.quest6D: After energizing it, use a Deployer to mount it onto a Fluxuated Magnet.
ftbquests.chapter.create_new_age.quest7E: Overcharged Gold Wire is the third conductive material in Create: New Age.
It transfers 4,096 SU/tick, ideal for mid-tier factories needing reliable power.
ftbquests.chapter.create_new_age.quest7F: 4× faster than the Basic Energizer and with a 100k FE buffer, making it perfect for energy needs.
ftbquests.chapter.create_new_age.quest9C: Fuel Inserter: automatically feeds fuel into the reactor rods.
Heat Vent: removes heat from the core and transfers it to your heating network.
ftbquests.chapter.create_new_age.questD3: The Basic Motor converts FE electricity into SU rotational force.

ftbquests.chapter.deeper_and_darker_2.qu: Deeper and Darker is a mod that aims to enhance the Deep Dark in Minecraft.
It adds many new features related to the Deep Dark and a new dimension called the &bOther&r&6side.&r
Here is your straight-up upgrade! This smithing template is key to making &b"Warden"&r tools.
They have special traits and are better than netherite!
&8Can be found in the ancient temple structure.
In this biome, you will find plenty of crystallized amber blocks and ember pillars.
There are also geysers on the ground. When you walk over them, they'll shoot you upwards, though they don't deal any damage.
The &d&lEchoing Forest&r is a beautiful biome.
It generates with many echo trees and echo soil covering the ground.
Here, you will find shattered and sculk snappers, though they pose no threat.
&bThe Soul Elytra&r can be equipped into the Chest slot, and compared to the regular Elytra, it offers &b+3&r armor points.
It also comes with the ability to use a boost without Firework Rockets, which can be done every 30 seconds by pressing the &nB&r key.
&bAncient Temple&r is the only structure that this mod provides, It contains some mediocre loot in general but still, there's some important stuff!
The &lDeeplands&r are primarily composed of sculk and sculk stone.
- In this biome, you will encounter:
Phantoms, sculk centipedes, sculk snappers, ground-dwelling sculk jaws, and infested sculk.
&bThe Warden Helmet&r grants immunity to Darkness and Blindness effects.
Once you found the portal, light it up with &bHeart Of The Deep&r &8(Make sure theres no sculk veins around it)
&bOther&r&6side&r is a dimension below the bedrock, It has a cavernous landscape with some cool biomes!
Here you will find bunch of &enew mobs and ores!&r If that doesn't sound good enough, you can even set your spawn point here with a bed.
To activate the &bBig Portal&r in the Deep Dark, you'll need to slay the Warden and claim its &bheart.&r
Be careful! The Warden in this modpack is far more formidable than the one you're used to.

When &bsneaking and right-clicking&r a block, the Sculk Transmitter will be &nlinked&r to it. This can include &bCrafting Tables, Chests, Anvils, Looms, Enchanting Tables, Brewing Stands, and more.&r Essentially, it is any block that you can normally interact with.

By holding the Sculk Transmitter and &bright-clicking,&r the linked blocks GUI will then be opened, allowing you to craft while on the move, and access distant inventories, among other useful features.

The Sculk Transmitter works at huge distances, over hundreds of blocks. However, &nit doesn’t work across different dimensions.&r Doing so will cause the Sculk Transmitter to become unlinked, but this can also be done manually by sneaking and right-clicking.
&8Can be found in the ancient temple structure.
&bStalker&r is a &cmini-boss&r that this mod offers. He can be summoned with a chance when breaking vases inside ancient temple.
He is pretty easy to kill but can be annoying, depending on how much leeches that he will spawn.
Killing him drops &bsoul crystal&r which will be useful!
&bThe Sonorous Staff&r functions as a chargeable ranged weapon. Hold right-click to charge the staff, then release to fire a sonic boom in the direction you’re facing.
The longer you charge, the more damage and range the attack gains.
The &b&lBlooming Caverns&r is distinguished by its glowing vegetation and water pools, this biome offers a strikingly different atmosphere from the dark Sculk-dominated regions of the dimension.
They contain edible food as well.
In here, you can find "Sludge" mobs. They drop &bResonarium&r which will be.. no it won't be important but if you are interested, with &bresonarium&r, you can make a armor and tools!

ftbquests.chapter.eldritch_element.quest: Channel the power of Illush, The Abyss of Illusion, to drive the target into madness, causing it to attack nearby non-caster allies. Cannot coexist with Disillusion: Fear. Ineffective against certain creatures.
Fire rays of pure, devastating energy.
From where you look, erupt a mass of sculk energy in the form of wailing tentacles, damaging and blinding creatures caught in the chaos.
Shift your vision in between planes, gaining the ability to see creatures through solid material.
Use Eldritch scrolls to learn eldritch spells
The Eldritch school is not like the others. It is an ancient and powerful way of magic, one that has all but been forgotten
Cloak yourself with the shadows of the abyss, granting the ability to evade any attack for a short duration of time.
Blast forth a sonic boom of immense power, passing through solid material with ease and harming the first creature in its path.
Reach out with a spectral force and grip a creature, forcing them towards your gaze. Creatures are susceptible to kinetic damage.

To prevent this, use a ember relay, u can connect them with the tinker hammer.
&8[Click to read]
Tinker hammer is used to make plates and configure ember emitters and receptors.
-Now shift+right-click to receptor, then to emitter. Finally, place a lever on the emitter. This will connect them and allow you to transport ember energy!
&8[Click to read]
Higher the gauge, the more ember!
Checks how much ember is in the current chunk.
Place it on the block that u want ember energy to be recieved.
&8[Click to read]

Simply attach the item extractor to a chest, or other storage unit.
Then attach the pipes to the item extractor, in order to actually pull items though, we will need a redstone signal which can be done with a lever!

Any lever
Fueling
Pipes can input but not output, to solve this we can use a mechanical core! it will work like a gearbox from create.. i mean if that makes sense.

How to output the resources
Can be dropped from ancient golem
Place it to output ember energy from the ember activator

ftbquests.chapter.ender_storage.quest4CB: Ender Pouches are a mobile type of Ender Storage.
You can use an EnderPouch on any EnderChest to change the pouch color code to match that of the chest.
Ender Pouches access the same inventory as their Ender Chest counterparts, allowing easy access to your base resources right from your inventory.
ftbquests.chapter.ender_storage.quest5D3: EnderTanks work on the same principal of EnderChests but store liquids.
ftbquests.chapter.ender_storage.quest6B1: Ender Chests are a stationary type of Ender Storage.
You can use dye on the wool pads on top of the chest to alter its color code. As an alternative, you can craft an EnderChest with three dyes to change the color code as well.
Ender Chests work as any other chest for the purposes of blocks that manipulate chests contents.
This makes EnderChests an ideal way to transport items over vast distances in an instant.

&6&nRing of The Seven Virtues&r
&b- Worldly Toll:&r You must draw upon the world's Natural Energy instead of your traditional Mana pool. If you exhaust this energy completely, the world itself will take a devastating toll on you.
&a&lSeven Virtues await the ascended:&r
&b- Divine Fortune:&r Granted +7 Luck.
&b- Extended Grasp:&r Granted +7 Block Reach.
&b- Master Plunderer:&r Yields +400%% more items from all generated loot chests.
&b- Alchemical Mastery:&r Allows you to endlessly stack the duration of all active beneficial potion effects.
&b- Relic Hunting:&r Grants the ability to obtain unique custom mob drops required to craft and wield divine relics.
&b- Divine Recall:&r Grants a custom ability to invoke a teleport back to your designated spawn point at will.
&b- Spell Deflection:&r Automatically redirects 60%% of ANY incoming spell damage you receive directly back into the world.
Following this dark path will guide you through managing your affliction, ultimately teaching you how to rid yourself of the ring or seek final redemption.
&c&lSeven Burdens are borne by the wearer:&r
&b- Melee Penalty:&r Weapons and tools resist your hand when wielded in melee combat.
&b- Aggro Magnet:&r Monsters will actively shift their targeting priority to you, protecting all other players nearby.
&b- Armor Dependence:&r You deal 4%% less damage for every single point of armor you wear. Worse yet, you deal absolutely no damage if you aren't wearing a full set of armor.
&b- Sacred Oath:&r A binding restriction completely denies you the right to strike or harm innocent animals.
&b- Eternal Frost:&r Whenever you are chilled, you remain freezing permanently and will never thaw out naturally.
&b- Absolute Darkness:&r All player movement is completely halted if you step into the total absence of light.
&8[Click to read]

&6&nRing of The Seven Curses&r
&eSkeletons \& Strays:&r 3 to 15 Arrows
&eZombies \& Husks:&r 1 to 3 Slime Balls &8(25%% Chance)&r
&eSpiders \& Cave Spiders:&r 2 to 12 String
&eGuardians:&r 1 Nautilus Shell &8(15%% Chance)&r, 2 to 5 Prismarine Crystals
&eEndermen:&r 1 to 2 Ender Eyes &8(40%% Chance)&r
&eBlazes:&r 0 to 5 Blaze Powder
&eZombified Piglins:&r 1 to 3 Gold Ingots &8(40%% Chance)&r, 1 to 7 Glowstone Dust &8(30%% Chance)&r
&eWitches:&r 1 Ghast Tear &8(30%% Chance)&r, 1 to 3 Phantom Membranes &8(50%% Chance)&r
&ePillagers \& Vindicators:&r 0 to 4 Emeralds
&eVillagers:&r 2 to 6 Emeralds

The Ring of the Seven Curses is a high-risk, game-changing accessory designed to make your survival significantly more brutal. While its severe penalties are meant to make your progression miserable, the suffering comes with unique, powerful advantages.
&eCreepers:&r 4 to 12 Gunpowder
&ePiglin Brutes:&r 1 Netherite Scrap &8(20%% Chance)&r
&eGhasts:&r 1 to 4 Phantom Membranes
&eDrowned:&r 1 to 3 Lapis Lazuli &8(30%% Chance)&r
&eVexes:&r 0 to 2 Glowstone Dust, 1 Phantom Membrane &8(30%% Chance)&r
&ePiglins:&r 2 to 4 Gold Ingots &8(50%% Chance)&r
&eMagma Cubes:&r 1 Blaze Powder &8(50%% Chance)&r
&eChickens:&r 1 Egg &8(50%% Chance)&r
&eWithers:&r 1 to 4 Nefarious Essence
&eRavagers:&r 3 to 10 Emeralds, 2 to 7 Leather, 0 to 4 Diamonds &8(50%% Chance)&r
&a&lThe Benefits:&r
&eWither Skeletons:&r 0 to 3 Blaze Powder, 1 Ghast Tear &8(20%% Chance)&r, 1 Netherite Scrap &8(7%% Chance)&r

&eEvokers:&r 1 Totem of Undying, 5 to 20 Emeralds, 1 Enchanted Golden Apple &8(10%% Chance)&r, 1 to 3 Ender Pearls &8(30%% Chance)&r, 2 to 4 Blaze Rods &8(30%% Chance)&r, 4 to 10 Bottles o' Enchanting &8(50%% Chance)&r
&eElder Guardians:&r 4 to 16 Prismarine Crystals, 7 to 28 Prismarine Shards, and a guaranteed choice of one of the following rare items:
&b-&r 1 Heart of the Guardian
&b-&r 1 Heart of the Sea
&b-&r 1 Enchanted Golden Apple
&b-&r 1 Ender Eye
&b-&r 1 Custom Trident &8(Enchanted at level 25 to 40)&r
&eEnder Dragons:&r 1 Heart of the Abyss.

&cNote:&r This item drops exclusively if the conquering player has spent at least 99.5%% of their total world time wearing the ring, and has acquired fewer than 4 total hearts. Unlike standard loot, this heart spawns directly at the coordinates of the dragon's final death animation and will remain floating silently in mid-air. Keep your eyes peeled, as it can be very easy to miss.
&b-&r Gain the ability to equip powerful, unique accessories that non-ring users can never wear.
&b-&r Earn significantly increased Experience (XP) from all standard sources.
&b-&r Unlock completely custom, high-tier item drops from defeated enemies.
&8Go to the next page to review the full custom loot table.
&c&lBe aware!: DROPS LOGGED ONLY VIA PLAYER KILLS&r
&eShulkers:&r 1 Astral Dust &8(20%% Chance)&r
&8[Click to read]
Ring of Seven Curses

ftbquests.chapter.evocation_element.ques: Around a targeted creature or block, summon a rolling wave of magical arrows from the sky.
Cast to briefly grant yourself true invisibility, which hides armor and held items, but immediately wears off upon dealing damage. Mobs also lose aggro.
Lob the head of a creeper forward that explodes in a medium radius around the impact. The higher the level, the faster the projectile.
Cast to conjure vexes that will follow, protect, and fight for you.
Conjure a spectral steed that will follow you around and only let you ride. The horse's speed, health, and jump height scales with spell power.

Around a targeted creature or block, conjure a ring of creeper heads that falls to the ground and explodes. Any creature killed by this blast will conjure another, smaller, ring of creeper heads. This can chain multiple times.
In a radius around a targeted creature, apply the Slowed effect to enemies, decreasing movement speed, attack speed, mining speed, mana regeneration, and cast time for a duration.
Conjure a spectral hammer out from where you look that will mine all connected stone-type blocks in a cube where it hits, leaving only ores and rubble behind.
Conjure protective rings of evoker fangs around you, in classic illager fashion.
Conjure a line of evoker fangs in front of you, in classic illager fashion.
Conjure a stationary shield of arcane energy where you look that will block projectiles and prevent creatures from passing.
Instantaneously conjure a firework where you look that explodes in a small radius around it.
The Evocation school is themed around magical trickery and conjuration, covering the broadest range of offensive, defensive, and utility spells.
Conjure a strong gust of wind, knocking back creatures in a conical shape, causing damage if they impact a wall.
ftbquests.chapter.false_prophets.image.h: Questlines belong to me, and is protected by all rights reserved. Do not try to steal without an explicit permission from me.
ftbquests.chapter.false_prophets.quest15: &6&lAdditionally:&r You can offer `Hellspec Ingots` to increase the chances of your tribute being accepted. Choose wisely, for the gods are notoriously cruel and impatient.
Once your offering is accepted, they will grant you the `Sacrificial Dirk`.

Do not let your guard down; the ritual is far from over. You must now sacrifice your own life. Drive the blade into your flesh continuously, until your blood hardens from the raw pain and suffering accumulating within you.
To draw the eyes of the gods upon you, a worthy tribute must be made.
Drop these items in a 2 block radius to start the ritual.
ftbquests.chapter.false_prophets.quest1A: Baal moves aggressively across the arena, tearing open portals to summon massive limbs. Each strike fractures and reshapes the terrain, forcing you to constantly navigate the shifting ground.
Defeat Baal to claim its heart.
ftbquests.chapter.false_prophets.quest1C: Morphegor fragments the space around him, forcing you to fight through a split existence where the line between the observer and the observed is entirely severed.
Endure the spatial distortion and strike him down. Defeating him allows you to claim his heart, which still pulses with a fractured purpose.
ftbquests.chapter.false_prophets.quest21: Gargamaw is an immense predatory entity driven entirely by consumption. Its massive, central maw draws in and crushes surrounding matter with severe physical force.
ftbquests.chapter.false_prophets.quest48: Born directly from your bloody offering, each shard echoes with the agonizing screams of those who abandoned the holy light. To hold this relic is to bear witness to the torment of the lost.
Activating this fragment will rupture reality itself, tearing open a threshold to drag you down into &4The Pit&r
ftbquests.chapter.false_prophets.quest4C: Ancient spires pierce the raw, bleeding flesh-sky, their jagged peaks crowned with unspeakable terrors. At the summit of each tower, absolute emptiness takes physical form.
The Hollow Man is an entity neither alive nor truly dead. Stands sentinel over secrets best left buried.
> Strike this guardian down. From his hollow corpse will spill the &cRoot of Infestation&r, a vital catalyst required to awaken far greater horrors: &4The False Gods&r.
ftbquests.chapter.false_prophets.quest56: Valamon is a towering construct of living scar tissue and exposed bone. A stitched cathedral compiled from the physical remnants of countless bodies. Its unhealed seams continuously leak fluid across its massive frame.
Shatter this amalgamation to shatter his fat pride.
ftbquests.chapter.false_prophets.quest74: Gomoria is an immense mass of fused torsos and screaming mouths, emitting layered, discordant chants.
These ancient vocalizations create a severe localized distortion, causing the surrounding environment to warp and fracture under the HORRIBLE sounds.

How Do I Tame a Owl?
ftbquests.chapter.hexerei.quest12B5E3921: Hexerei is a witchery and magic mod that includes really beautiful things!
To start with the questline, i suggest using Book of The Shadows for in-game wiki and putting it on the altar.
&8How am i going to find the wood type for it?
Hexerei mod generates some trees around the world, it's really not hard to find them!
ftbquests.chapter.hexerei.quest19C6E7916: Broom Neterite Tip will allow you to fly through lava and fire without getting damaged!
ftbquests.chapter.hexerei.quest22961E333: The mixing cauldron is one of the main tools in hexerei.
Mixing up all sorts of items and potions!
Cauldron can hold items, fluids and these systems integrate with other mods such as create.
It will help us create some items and blocks!
The mixing cauldron when heated can brew up to two buckets worth of potions at a time.
To do this, fill it with water, then add two of the ingredient needed to make the potion!
ftbquests.chapter.hexerei.quest37B8692BF: The coffer is a very useful storage method in hexerei, it uses crows to automate storage!
On the right side of the coffer's GUI is a crow icon.
While toggled, the crow button will allow crows on gather mode to check items inside the coffer and look in the area for items matching its contents to deposit.
Crows with a perch located on a coffer will pick up any item in the area and return it to that coffer!
ftbquests.chapter.hexerei.quest3ADA80DFC: Courier packages are perfect for sending items to other players or depots.
Delivered by owls, your parcels will always reach their destination!
ftbquests.chapter.hexerei.quest411D1E658: Packing peanuts are not only perfect for cushioning your Courier packages, but also make for a delightful light snack!
ftbquests.chapter.hexerei.quest439C7D4A7: Broom whistle is a handy tool for any witch.
Bind it to your broom and with a simple blow, your broom will come flying to you!
ftbquests.chapter.hexerei.quest445F7EAAD: The Crow can be tamed with a seed mixture.
&8If you throw the mixture to ground you have lower chance of taming them than giving them by hand.
Once tamed crows can be set to different commands.
The player can change these commands by simply right-clicking the crow!
Crows contain 3 slots that are Hand, Hat and Misc.
Misc slot can be equip with weapons or storage items!
If you right-click to your crow with a dye you can add a colored bandanna!
ftbquests.chapter.hexerei.quest448DDF682: Brushes are one of the most important attachments, as they allow the broom to fly.
Eventually the brush will be damaged, and will break.
&8All brushes can be enchanted by the way.
ftbquests.chapter.hexerei.quest4665C4EBA: Unlike the candles, Candelabras wont go out on their own.
They can be placed on top of a block, or under a block. Including chains and more.
ftbquests.chapter.hexerei.quest480570240: The candles are a dyeable, decorative block which can be used for lightning or magic.
Up to 4 different candles can be placed in the same block.
A candle can be lit with a flint and stell and will typically stay lit for 35 minutes.
&8Candles are lit individually, in the order of they were placed in.
&8When placed near an altar and lit, the candles will start floating around it.
&8You can also craft several items with candle to add a decorative base to it!
ftbquests.chapter.hexerei.quest54240BF12: The Herb Jar is perfect for keeping ingredients in bulk.
It can hold up to 1024 items of only one type.
Like coffers, herb jars also have a crow icon, letting your crows keep your herb collection tidy!
ftbquests.chapter.hexerei.quest550EED2B2: Courier letters are great for sending secret messages to other players or depots.
Whether you're sharing important information or just keeping in touch.
Delivered by our witch trusty owls;
Your words will always find their way to the intended recipient!
ftbquests.chapter.hexerei.quest5A487F862: A witch's main tool of transportation!
&8The willow is the slowest but also the most common one.
&8The mahogany being the fastest but rarest to find one.
Brooms have three slots for upgrades: Misc, Satchel, and Brush.
The brush is what allows the broom to fly and it comes with every broom you make!
ftbquests.chapter.hexerei.quest5D3BA46F1: Crow flute is an essential item that controls your crow companions.
It has a menu for assigning commands, selecting crows and setting a crow's perch position!
ftbquests.chapter.hexerei.quest61DB44DC9: Blood is a key ingredient in the creation of flying brooms.
Can be acquired by using blood sigil!
ftbquests.chapter.hexerei.quest6405BF216: Cuorier depots serve as a crucial center for managing all your deliveries.
With this efficient design and charming aesthetics, it ensures that every parcel and massage is delivered with utmost care and precision!
ftbquests.chapter.hexerei.quest6829096FF: The pestle and mortar is used for smashing and grinding items to paste.

ftbquests.chapter.hexerei.quest688E3BBF4: The broom seat is a mix between a satchel and a cosmetic seat, making the rider face forwards.
ftbquests.chapter.hexerei.quest6C47E7849: The dowsing rrod is able to loacte certain biomes containing the need for plants.

ftbquests.chapter.hexerei.quest70630186B: The Dipper is an attachment for the mixing cauldron, mainly used for making candles by dipping string into the tallow.
Sneak Right-Click to put attachment on cauldron!
ftbquests.chapter.hexerei.quest721C181D9: Sage burning plate can protect your home from monsters.
Simply place one down, fill it with bundle of dried sage, then light it to prevent monster spawns.
By default, it's effect can reach in a 48 block radious around the plate!
Can also use dried sage bundle to stop spawns!
ftbquests.chapter.hexerei.quest73D552422: The crystal ball is a useful tool, able to reveal the phase of the moon, or the sun if it's daytime.

ftbquests.chapter.holy_element.quest1F6B: A more powerful but much slower version of heal, this spell will completely heal yourself upon being casted.
ftbquests.chapter.holy_element.quest23A1: Around a targeted creature or block, place a stationary circle of holy magic that heals allies within.
ftbquests.chapter.holy_element.quest2839: Cast to target any creature, showing a glowing outline. Completing the cast will heal this creature.
ftbquests.chapter.holy_element.quest2D8B: Fire a slow bolt of holy energy. Creatures hit will gain the Guided effect, homing nearby projectiles in towards them.

ftbquests.chapter.holy_element.quest42E6: In a radius around a targeted creature, or yourself if no creature is targeted, apply the Hastened effect, increasing movement speed, attack speed, mining speed, mana regeneration, and cast time reduction for a duration.

ftbquests.chapter.holy_element.quest6D4F: Upon casting, fortify every friendly creature within a radius around you, giving them temporary HP.
ftbquests.chapter.holy_element.quest7917: With a fervor of holy energy, swing forth your weapon, doing a melee area attack. This spell is uninterruptible. The damage scales off of your held weapon's melee damage and enchantments.

ftbquests.chapter.ice_element.quest37DB7: Cast to summon a polar bear who will follow, protect, and fight for you, as well as providing a mount.
ftbquests.chapter.ice_element.quest40EA0: Instantaneously teleport to where you are looking, leaving behind a shadow of ice. This shadow will shatter after 3 seconds or upon taking any damage, shooting out icicles in every direction.
ftbquests.chapter.ice_element.quest49184: Hold to cast out a cone of cold energy, freezing creatures in its path.
ftbquests.chapter.ice_element.quest4A790: Fire a piercing bolt of cold energy in the form of an icicle, freezing those it touches.
ftbquests.chapter.ice_element.quest5BA5C: Conjure a giant chunk of ice above a targeted creature or block. After a short delay, it will fall down and explode for area frost damage, doing additional damage to any creatures hit on the way down.

You can get power from kinetic motion aswell.
The Kinetic Dynamo generates power from the flow of water or the speed of the wind.
The Crusher multiblock from Immersive Engineering lets us crush materials on a larger scale.
It breaks items down, sometimes producing materials we couldn’t get before
The Industrial Squeezer is used to extra oil from seeds.
It can also be used to squeeze Coke Dust into Graphite Dust.
With electricity available, we can add Blast Furnace Preheaters to boost our Improved Blast Furnace.
This the Lightning Rod, we can harness this power and generate energy from it.
The lightning will strike the rod and generate power.
Steel fences can be used to increase the height of the rod.
The Fermenter multiblock is used to produce Ethanol.
Ethanol can be made from various crops and used to create other resources
This machine allows for continuous, automated Steel output.
Now we can dive into the mod!
Applying Creosote Oil to regular planks gives us access to Treated Planks. Treated Planks are used to make higher end equipment and machinery. We want to keep a steady supply of these.
&7I don't really know the mod btw, so here's a tutorial video.
The Sawmill cuts logs into planks faster than the Create saw.
It also produces Sawdust, which can be used to make cardboard boxes.
Connecting Water Wheels to a Kinetic Dynamo lets you passively generate power from flowing water.
Make sure the water isn’t flowing against parts of the wheel it shouldn’t, or it will slow down the rotation.
With Biodiesel ready, we can build a Diesel Generator to produce much more power.
This is one of our first major steps toward large-scale power production.
Set it up, supply the materials, and it will craft the recipes you’ve assigned automatically.
With Coke Dust ready, we can start building a Coke Oven. It takes some time to make, but it lets us produce Coal Coke and Creosote.
Building a Blast Furnace lets you use the Coal Coke we’ve been producing to superheat Iron into Steel.
It also creates Slag as a byproduct!
With a Metal Press, you can use electricity to create plates, rods, and wires.
It’s faster and more automatable than the Create Press.
This book is a life saver if you are confused!
It shows tons of information about multi-block structures and more.
The Arc Furnace provides us with a simpiler way to be able to produce HOP Graphite without having to loose so many resources.
It also opens up the ability to begin processing all of the Osmium we had been gathering.
The main tool in Immersive Engineering is the Engineer’s Hammer. It’s used to rotate machines and assemble multiblock structures.
With the Refinery, we can create new resources by refining what we already have.
Combine Ethanol and Plant Oil to make Biodiesel for power generation.
You can also produce Phenolic Resin, which is needed for other materials later on.
You can harness wind power using Windmills connected to a Kinetic Dynamo.
Simply place a Windmill on the Dynamo, and the wind will generate power automatically.
Windmill Sails improve the efficiency of your windmills.
Attach them to a windmill to generate more energy from the wind.
The Mixer is used to create Redstone Acid, which is essential for progressing in Mekanism.
It can also combine experience with mob drops to produce Mob Essence for crafting special resources.
LV, MV, and HV Accumulators&r are a compact way to store power.
Use the Engineer’s Hammer to configure their input and output sides.
The Thermoelectric Generator produces power from heat differences.
Just place different heat blocks around it and the energy will start flowing.
Check your Engineer’s Manual for details on how much each block contributes.
Building and designing the same thing repeatedly can be frustrating, that’s where Schematicannon comes in.
The Bottling Machine is essential for producing advanced resources.
Phenolic Resin can be turned into Duroplast and Grinding Disks.
It can also create Redstone Acid Dusts.
Excavators are machines that gather resources from the world.
They work chunk by chunk, digging and collecting materials until the resources in the area are fully depleted.
You can make Rough Rods with a Metal Press, or get the recipe from a trader to craft them in an Engineer’s Table.
